1000646954.english: P-24 Pinto, please continue to maintain a high altitude.

1000646960.english: T-14 Miho, don't get ahead of yourself.

1000646996.english: P-24 Pinto, what's the situation around you?

1000646997.english: Hearing the commotion, nearby Iron Bug Beasts are swarming in. It's too fast.
1000646997.korean: 소란을 듣고 근처 철충들이 몰려오고 있어요. 너무 빨라요.

1000647000.english: So what? Whether it's the Iron Bugs or you guys, all we have to do is blow them all up, right?
1000647000.korean: 그래서 어쩌라고? 철충이든 너희든 전부 터트려버리면 되는 거잖아?

1000647004.english: Mongoose team, you need to hold out until P-24 Pinto arrives.
1000647004.korean: 몽구스 팀, 핀토가 올 때까지 버텨야해요.

1000647010.english: Tch. All the traps I prepared so carefully are useless now because of the Iron Bug.
1000647010.korean: 쳇. 기껏 준비한 함정들이 철충 때문에 전부 쓸모없어졌잖아.

1000647012.english: T-14 Miho! Would it be possible to provide covering fire?

1000647022.english: The Iron Bugs are still swarming in. Stop fighting now-
1000647022.korean: 철충이 계속 몰려들고 있어요. 이만 싸움을 멈추고-

1000647023.english: It doesn't matter, I can just blow up the Iron Bugs and all of you.
1000647023.korean: 상관없어, 나는 철충도 너희도 전부 터트려버리면 되니까.

1000647030.english: I've arrived! I'll take care of the Iron Bug blocking my view first!

1000647041.english: T-60 Bulgasari, I'll support you, so go for it!

1000647042.english: Okay, be careful, there are still Iron Bugs Beasts around.
1000647042.korean: 알았어, 아직 주변에 철충이 있으니 조심해.

1000647054.english: P-24 Pinto, please track the boots.

1000647066.english: Mother receiving. What's the situation with the surrounding Iron Bug Ones?
1000647066.korean: 마더 수신. 주변 철충 상황은 어떤가요?

1000647067.english: Ugh, it's not very good. Because of the commotion just now, all the nearby Iron Bug Beasts have started moving.
1000647067.korean: 윽, 별로 안 좋아요. 좀 전의 소란 때문에 근방 철충들이 전부 움직이기 시작했어요.

1000647093.english: Mom! Iron Bugs will arrive on the scene soon!

1000647097.english: While Draco and Bulgasari block the boots, we'll take care of the Iron Bug.
1000647097.korean: 드라코와 불가사리가 장화를 막는동안 저희가 철충을 처리합니다.

1000647106.english: Everyone, be careful! Some Iron Bug Beasts have broken thru and are heading that way-
1000647106.korean: 여러분, 조심하세요! 일부 철충이 돌파해서 그쪽으로-

1000647107.english: Oh, a T-60 Bulgasari! Draco! Be careful!

1000647118.english: It was a chaotic situation with even the Iron Bug joining in. It's a huge relief that you weren't hurt.
1000647118.korean: 철충까지 끼어든 혼잡한 상황이었으니까요. 다치지 않은게 천만다행이에요.

1000647156.english: Other than a few Iron Bug nearby, there's no problem.
1000647156.korean: 주변에 철충이 조금 있는 것 말고는 문제없어요.

1000647157.english: - It seems some of the Iron Bug have escaped.

1000647169.english: There are two groups of Iron Bug Beasts a certain distance from here...
1000647169.korean: 이곳에서 어느 정도 떨어진 지점에 두 개의 철충 집단이 있는데...

1000647180.english: Last time I missed it because of the Iron Bug, but this time the support troops can be deployed right away.
1000647180.korean: 저번에는 철충때문에 놓쳤지만, 이번에는 지원 병력이 곧바로 투입될 수 있으니까.

1000647184.english: Operations Officer, the behavior of the Iron Bug is strange.

1000647187.english: Boots, Boots are engaged with the Iron Bugs - Ah!
1000647187.korean: 장화, 장화가 철충과 교전 중- 앗!

1000647188.english: They're attacking the Iron Bugs and coming this way.

1000647189.english: Boots? T-14 Miho, can you fire all the way to the combat zone?
1000647189.korean: 장화요? 미호, 교전 지역까지 사격할 수 있나요?

1000647203.english: Be careful, there are a lot of Iron Bugs

1000647207.english: The boots began attacking the Iron Bugs

1000647209.english: First, I asked P-24 Pinto to provide boots in case of an emergency.
1000647209.korean: 우선 만약의 경우를 대비해 핀토에게 장화를 지원해달라고 했습니다.

1000647212.english: - It seems the surrounding Iron Bug Ones are swarming in because the boots indiscriminately detonated bombs.
1000647212.korean: - 장화가 무차별로 폭탄을 터뜨린 탓에 주변의 철충들이 몰려오는 듯하다.

1000647217.english: Wait, C-77 HongRyeon, I'm on my way there now.
1000647217.korean: 기다려 홍련, 지금 그쪽으로 가고 있으니까.

1000647230.english: T-14 Miho, let's go back and regroup for now.

1000647232.english: P-24 Pinto! How is the situation?

1000647233.english: The boots are right here, but they're surrounded by a horde of Iron Bug.
1000647233.korean: 장화는 이 앞에 있습니다만, 철충 무리에 둘러싸였어요.

1000647246.english: - When I arrived leading the main force, I saw JangHwa and C-77 HongRyeon surrounded by Ironclad.
1000647246.korean: - 본대를 이끌고 도착하니 철충에 둘러싸인 장화와 홍련의 모습이 보였다.

1000647247.english: Commander, there are still Iron Bug Beasts nearby...

1000647251.english: - C-77 HongRyeon slowly walked toward the trembling boots.
1000647251.korean: - 몸을 떨고 있는 장화를 향해 홍련이 천천히 걸어갔다.

1000647254.english: - C-77 HongRyeon smiled at JangHwa and spread her arms wide.
1000647254.korean: - 홍련은 장화를 향해 미소 지으며, 양팔을 벌렸다.

1000647257.english: - JangHwa lowered her head and slowly looked at C-77 HongRyeon.
1000647257.korean: - 장화는 고개를 떨구고 천천히 홍련을 바라보았다.

1000647260.english: - C-77 HongRyeon threw herself into JangHwa's arms, and the two of them disappeared into the explosion.
1000647260.korean: - 홍련은 장화에게 몸을 내던졌고, 두 사람의 모습은 폭연 속으로 사라졌다.

1000647272.english: Ugh, the Iron Bug are still swarming in.

1000647275.english: - JangHwa takes out the detonator and walks toward the Iron Bug alone.
1000647275.korean: - 장화는 기폭 장치를 꺼내고, 홀로 철충을 향해 걸어간다.

1000647287.english: - JangHwa fights alone against the swarming Iron Bug.
1000647287.korean: - 장화는 몰려드는 철충에 홀로 맞서 싸운다.

1000647292.english: - Bulgasari begins to break thru the Iron Bug.

1000647297.english: - Thru the gap created by the two people, C-77 HongRyeon ran toward the boots.
1000647297.korean: - 두 사람이 만든 틈으로 홍련이 장화를 향해 뛰어갔다.

1000647320.english: - C-77 HongRyeon reaches out her hand to JangHwa.

1000647324.english: - JangHwa slowly takes C-77 HongRyeon's hand.

1000647326.english: - JangHwa pushed C-77 HongRyeon away and collapsed.

1000647328.english: - The Mongoose team is desperately trying to hold back the Iron Bug, but they are struggling due to being outnumbered.
1000647328.korean: - 몽구스 팀은 필사적으로 철충을 막아서고 있지만, 수적 열세로 인해 고전을 면치 못했다.

1000647329.english: There are too many Iron Bug, I can't hold out any longer!
1000647329.korean: 철충이 너무 많아서 더는 버틸 수 없어요!

1000647333.english: - But the boots remained still, cradled in C-77 HongRyeon's arms.
1000647333.korean: - 하지만 장화는 홍련에게 안긴 채, 아무런 미동도 하지 않았다.

1000647336.english: - C-77 HongRyeon had a look on her face as if she were about to burst into tears at any moment.
1000647336.korean: - 홍련은 금방이라도 울음을 터트릴 것만 같은 표정을 지었다.

1000647341.english: - C-77 HongRyeon immediately ran toward the Orca.
1000647341.korean: - 홍련은 곧바로 오르카 호를 향해 뛰어갔다.

1000647343.english: - After a brief stalemate, P-24 Pinto's communication came thru.
1000647343.korean: - 잠깐의 교착 끝에 핀토의 통신이 들어왔다.

1000647346.english: - As soon as I finish speaking, a barrage of attacks rains down on the Iron Bug.
1000647346.korean: - 내 말이 끝남과 동시에, 철충에게 폭격이 쏟아진다.

1000647348.english: All those Iron Bug Beasts... at once...

1000647356.english: - The person who opened the door and came in was C-77 HongRyeon and...

1000647366.english: The first day I met C-77 HongRyeon, it bothered me so much that she had the same face as me but was recognized by those around her.
1000647366.korean: 홍련을 처음 만난 날, 나와 같은 얼굴이면서 주변의 인정을 받는 모습이 너무나도 거슬렸어.

1000647385.english: - JangHwa and C-77 HongRyeon looked at me.

1000647411.english: - But on C-77 HongRyeon's returning face, there was a smile instead of sadness.
1000647411.korean: - 하지만 돌아오는 홍련의 얼굴에는 슬픔 대신 미소가 가득했다.

1000647423.english: ... C-77 HongRyeon, do you remember when you first joined the Orca?
1000647423.korean: ...홍련, 네가 오르카 호에 합류한지 얼마 안됐을 때 기억해?

1000647429.english: There are Iron Bug Ones nearby... There's still quite a bit left, tho.

1000647431.english: Can the Mongoose team handle the Iron Bugs on their own?
1000647431.korean: 철충은 몽구스 팀만으로 처리할 수 있겠어?

1000647441.english: P-24 Pinto, please identify any isolated allies.

1000647447.english: Before the Iron Bugs appeared, could you tell me how you lived?
1000647447.korean: 철충이 나타나기 전, 어떻게 살아왔는지 말해줄래?

1000647448.english: What happens after the Iron Bug appear?

1000647468.english: - It was good that we restored Sekhmet of Death, who will be a great asset with Cerestia of Life's help.
1000647468.korean: - 세레스티아의 도움으로 큰 전력이 되어줄 세크메트를 복원한 것까진 좋았다.

1000647469.english: - After being restored, I didn't even mind bickering with Cerestia of Life for a while.
1000647469.korean: - 복원된 뒤, 세레스티아와 한동안 티격태격 하는 것도 별로 신경쓰지 않았다.

1000647483.english: - After a brief struggle, I finally managed to get some time alone and then ran into Cerestia of Life again, who was waiting in front of the bathroom.
1000647483.korean: - 잠시 실랑이를 벌인 뒤 간신히 혼자만의 시간을 보내고, 화장실 앞에서 기다리고 있던 세레스티아와 다시 마주했다.

1000647484.english: How about Sekhmet of Death's group?

1000647486.english: - Cerestia of Life smiled gently and softly stroked a flower growing on the hallway wall.
1000647486.korean: - 세레스티아는 싱긋 웃으며 복도 벽에 자라고 있는 꽃 한송이를 부드럽게 쓰다듬었다.

1000647490.english: - I remembered Sekhmet of Death's ability, which I had read about in the information, to instantly decompose organic matter.
1000647490.korean: - 정보에서 보았던, 유기물을 순식간에 분해해버리는 세크메트의 능력이 떠올랐다.

1000647492.english: - When I asked why Sekhmet of Death was calling me "Your Majesty," Cerestia of Life tilted her head.
1000647492.korean: - 세크메트가 왜 나를 폐하라고 부르는지 묻자, 세레스티아는 고개를 갸웃했다.

1000647494.english: Oh, Sekhmet of Death and I are destined to serve our master as king... I think I threw it, too~?
1000647494.korean: 아, 저랑 세크메트는 주인을 왕으로 모시게 되어있... 던 것 같기도 하고요~?

1000647497.english: And this is something I'm telling you specifically... When you go back to Sekhmet of Death, try saying this once:
1000647497.korean: 그리고 이건 특별히 알려드리는 건데요... 세크메트한테 돌아가면 이렇게 한 번 말해보세요~

1000647499.english: - After being held captive by Cerestia of Life for a while and then escaping, when I returned to the captain's cabin, Sekhmet of Death was waiting, radiating coldness.
1000647499.korean: - 한동안 세레스티아에게 붙잡혀 있다 탈출한 뒤 함장실로 돌아오자, 세크메트가 냉기를 풀풀 날리며 기다리고 있었다.

1000647505.english: - Watching Sekhmet of Death get up and start preparing to leave... No, when did you set up house in my room like this?
1000647505.korean: - 자리에서 일어나 주섬주섬 나갈 준비를 하는 세크메트의 모습을 보며... 아니, 언제 이렇게 내 방에 살림을 차려놓은거지?

1000647506.english: - Just as Cerestia of Life said a moment ago...

1000647508.english: When you go back to Sekhmet of Death, try saying this:
1000647508.korean: 세크메트한테 돌아가면 이렇게 한 번 말해보세요~

1000647518.english: - Whatever had happened, Sekhmet of Death, covered in grass, immediately headed for the kitchen upon returning.
1000647518.korean: - 무슨 일이 있었는지, 풀잎 투성이가 되어 돌아온 세크메트는 곧바로 주방으로 향했다.

1000647528.english: - After hesitating for a while, the words I finally spoke froze Sekhmet of Death in place like a still image.
1000647528.korean: - 한동안 망설이다 꺼낸 말에 세크메트는 정지화면처럼 딱 굳었다.

1000647531.english: - As she said that and reached to clear the plates, a hint of disappointment flashed in Sekhmet of Death's eyes.
1000647531.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 접시를 치우려는 세크메트의 눈빛에 얼핏 섭섭함이 스쳤다.

1000647532.english: - Although I haven't experienced much yet, I can definitely tell that Sekhmet of Death's maternal love and her sincere desire to fulfill her role, even if she's clumsy, are genuine.
1000647532.korean: - 아직 많이 겪어보진 못했지만, 세크메트의 모성애와 서툴면서도 어떻게든 역할을 해내려는 마음은 진심이라는 것은 충분히 알 수 있다.

1000647538.english: - I took a large spoonful of rice and, while marveling at its exquisite taste, met Sekhmet of Death's eyes, who was looking at me with such a proud expression.
1000647538.korean: - 밥을 한 술 크게 입에 밀어 넣고, 그 신묘한 맛에 감탄하는 동안 나를 너무나 뿌듯한 눈으로 바라보고 있는 세크메트와 눈이 마주쳤다.

1000647543.english: - But Sekhmet of Death's proud gaze made me think, if I really had a mother, this is what it would feel like... I thought to myself.
1000647543.korean: - 하지만 세크메트의 뿌듯한 눈빛에, 만약 진짜 엄마가 있었다면 이런 느낌이지 않을까... 하는 생각이 들었다.

1000647545.english: - After finishing our late dinner, Sekhmet of Death, who had retrieved all her toiletries from a corner of the captain's cabin, called me.
1000647545.korean: - 늦은 저녁 식사를 마치고 난 뒤, 함장실 구석에서 세면도구 일체를 꺼내온 세크메트가 나를 불렀다.

1000647568.english: Cerestia of Life doesn't call it that, does she- uh.

1000647586.english: Let's eat together, Sekhmet of Death.

1000647590.english: Good night to you too, Sekhmet of Death.

1000647591.english: - We gathered for a meeting at Indomitable Marie's request. The meeting topic is about the structures found in various locations, including near the base.
1000647591.korean: - 마리의 요청으로 회의를 하기 위해 모였다. 회의 주제는 거점 인근을 비롯한 여러 장소에서 발견된 구조물에 대해서.

1000647597.english: It is not that there were no results. This is a piece of ore that P/A-00 Griffon found near the entrance leading underground.
1000647597.korean: 성과가 없던 것은 아닙니다. 이것은 그리폰이 지하로 통하는 입구 근처에서 발견한 광석 조각입니다.

1000647599.english: - Indomitable Marie pointed to a golden, shimmering stone fragment on the table.
1000647599.korean: - 마리가 테이블 위에서 금빛으로 빛나는 돌조각을 가리켰다.

1000647604.english: It was a huge help that P/A-00 Griffon gave me even this.
1000647604.korean: 그리폰 언니가 이거라도 가져와줘서 엄청 도움이 됐어.

1000647621.english: - Indomitable Marie handed over the documents. Below the title, the operation objectives, estimated time required, necessary supplies, and personnel selection details are listed one after another.
1000647621.korean: - 마리가 서류를 내밀었다. 제목 아래로 작전목표와 예상 소요 시간, 필요한 물자, 인원 차출 내역등이 줄줄이 적혀있다.

1000647628.english: - Indomitable Marie pointed to the operational area map attached to the documents.
1000647628.korean: - 마리가 서류에 첨부된 작전지역 지도를 가리켰다.

1000647636.english: Let me know as soon as it's occupied, Indomitable Marie. I'll prepare a few things and come too. I need to take a look at the fairness structure.
1000647636.korean: 점령되는 대로 알려줘, 마리 언니. 나도 여러가지 준비하고 갈게. 공정구조를 살펴봐야겠어.

1000647650.english: Until now, it was just Cia and me alone, living with the sole goal of survival. But... in a ruined world, and on the opposite side of the globe... I never expected to meet the person of my destiny, Commander. As I said at the beginning, thank you for taking us in. And thank you for loving me. ...I really love you too.
1000647650.korean: 저는 지금껏 시아랑 단 둘이, 오로지 살아남는 것만을 목표로 살아왔습니다. 그런데...&n멸망한 세상에서, 그것도 지구 반대편에서… 제 운명의 사람을 만나게 될 줄은 정말 몰랐어요.​ 사령관님.&n처음에도 말씀드렸지만, 저희를 받아주셔서 감사합니다. 그리고 저를 사랑해주셔서 감사합니다. ...저도, 정말로 사랑해요.

1000647651.english: Wow...! Cia, you know this means you give it to the person you really like and then mar...ry them, right? ...Ah. But Cia doesn't have this. What should I do... Huh? Cia doesn't have to give it? But Cia really, really likes the squad leader... Is it really okay not to give it...? Hmm... then, then... Ah! Then instead, Cia will grant all of the squad leader's wishes.
1000647651.korean: 와아...! 시아 이거 알아. 엄~청 좋아하는 사람한테 주고 결... 혼? 하는거지? ...아. 근데&n시아는 이거 없어. 어떡하지... 응? 시아는 안 줘도 돼? 그치만 시아, 전단장님 엄~청 좋아하는데...&n진짜로 안 줘도 돼...? 으응... 그러면, 그러면... 아! 그러면 대신 시아가 전단장님 소원 전~부 들어줄게.

1000647653.english: Th-this... Master... I'm really happy. MH-4 Thetis will be a maid solely for the Master she truly loves from now on. ...You expected me to say that? Kyahaha, there's no way I would— why are you so moved?! This is just... just a joke... B-but a little of it was sincere. The part... 'truly love' before 'I will be a maid only for Master.'
1000647653.korean: 이건... 주, 주인님... 정말 기뻐요. 테티스는 앞으로, 정말 좋아하는 주인님만을 위한 메이드가&n될게요. ...라고 할 줄 아셨어요? 꺄하핫, 제가 그럴리가- 왜, 왜 그렇게 감동하시는 거예요?!&n이런 거 그냥… 그냥, 장난인데… 그, 그래도 아주 조금은 진심이었어요. 그...&n'주인님만을 위한 메이드가 될게요.' 앞에... '정말 좋아하는' 부분요.​

1000647799.english: Cia! Don’t just run off like that...

1000647818.english: Because of Cia, Emy-sis hasn’t eaten anything for a whole week...
1000647818.korean: 엠피 언니, 시아 때문에 벌써 일주일 동안 아무것도 못 먹었어...

1000647828.english: Leaving the dazed Amphitrite and the overexcited Salacia in Constantia S2’s care, I headed for the conference room.
1000647828.korean: - 멍한 얼굴로 중얼거리는 엠피트리테와 잔뜩 신난 살라시아를 콘스탄챠에게 맡기고 회의실로 향했다.

1000647852.english: Of the known hostile forces, the Iron Bugs and the Children of the Stars are beyond Orca’s current power to confront.
1000647852.korean: - 우리의 적대 세력중, 철충과 별의 아이는 현재 오르카의 전력으로는 상대할 수 없다.

1000647901.english: Same mission as P-2000 Djinnia. But instead of protecting me, focus on intercepting enemy aerial forces.
1000647901.korean: 지니야랑 같은 임무야. 하지만 날 보호하는 것보다 적 공중병력의 요격에 집중해줘.

1000647904.english: Type-37 Daika, you’ll act as the control tower — compile my orders and each member’s situation, and share them with the squad. Banshee, you’re on precision strikes.
1000647904.korean: 다이카는 내가 내리는 지휘와 각 대원이 처한 상황을 종합, 부대원들에게 공유하는 관제탑 역할이야. 밴시는 정밀 타격.

1000647908.english: B-11 Night Angel and Strato Angel, you’ll be moving with me in this operation. We’ll crush the coastal forces in one blow.
1000647908.korean: 나이트앤젤과 스트라토엔젤은 이번 작전에선 나랑 같이 움직여. 해안선의 병력을 단번에 분쇄할 거야.

1000647926.english: May of Doom, who used to blush just by meeting my eyes, was looking at me seriously.
1000647926.korean: - 눈만 마주쳐도 얼굴을 붉히던 메이가 나를 진지하게 바라봤다.

1000647943.english: P-2000 Djinnia, what are you doing, so uncool!

1000647945.english: S-sorry, P-18 Sylphid. It just went down the wrong way...

1000647949.english: Anyway, P-2000 Djinnia. Did you... properly protect the Captain?
1000647949.korean: 그건 그렇고, 지니야. 너는... 대장님을 제대로 지켰어?

1000647959.english: Sounds tough, but if it’s for everyone... alright, P-18 Sylphid. I’ll starve too.
1000647959.korean: 힘들 것 같지만 모두를 위해서라면... 알았어, 실피드. 나도 굶을게.

1000647962.english: A-as expected of the Captain. Such incredible operational ability. But I, B-7 Strato Angel, am no less...
1000647962.korean: 여, 역시 대장님. 엄청난 작전수행 능력이시군요. 하지만 저 스트라토 엔젤도 뒤지지 않는...

1000647964.english: Are you alright, B-7 Strato Angel?

1000647966.english: Surely A-87 Banshee is unfazed too, right?

1000647988.english: Black Lilith gave me a slight smile, then moved to her guard position.
1000647988.korean: - 리리스는 내게 살짝 웃어보이곤 경호 위치로 향했다.

1000648014.english: Built by PECS during the War of Annihilation to seize control of the seas, where the Iron Bugs were relatively weaker.
1000648014.korean: 멸망 전쟁 때, 상대적으로 철충의 약세였던 해상을 장악하기 위해서 PECS에서 건조한 전함입니다.

1000648016.english: To counter maneuver-type Iron Bugs, its deck is bristling with anti-air cannons and CIWS, on top of devastating naval guns.
1000648016.korean: 그리고 기동형 철충에 대한 대응능력을 갖추기 위해 대공포와 CIWS가 갑판에 빼곡하게 설치된 건 물론, 괴멸적인 화력을 가진 함포까지.

1000648019.english: At Indomitable Marie’s words, Black Lilith and I turned to look at the Invincible Dragon.
1000648019.korean: - 마리의 말이 끝나고, 리리스와 나는 무적의 용을 바라봤다.

1000648087.english: - I called Black Lilith, who had entered combat stance, and quickly finished the calculations.
1000648087.korean: - 전투태세에 들어간 리리스를 불러 세우고 급히 계산을 마쳤다.

1000648118.english: Miss Black Lilith is deploying all Companions and Battle Maids.
1000648118.korean: 리리스 양은 모든 컴패니언과 배틀 메이드를 배치 중입니다.

1000648171.english: Hey, Cali. Doesn’t Captain May of Doom look really pissed off?
1000648171.korean: 야, 칼리. 메이 대장님, 굉장히 열 받은 것 같지 않아?

1000648218.english: This is the first time I’m showing my face… My name is Connector Yumi.
1000648218.korean: 얼굴을 보여드리는 건 처음이네요... 저는 유미.

1000648230.english: A Connector Yumi model I was familiar with, yet somehow the atmosphere around her was different. Rather than looking exhausted, there was something—
1000648230.korean: - 나에게도 익숙한 유미 모델. 그렇지만 어딘지 모르게 분위기가 다르다. 피곤해 보이기보다는 뭔가-

1000648233.english: Miss Connector Yumi, are you alright?

1000648240.english: Suddenly, Connector Yumi’s breathing grew rapid.

1000648245.english: It seems Connector Yumi has reasons she cannot speak of for aiding the Orca, but… we don’t have time for that now.
1000648245.korean: - 유미가 오르카 호를 돕는 데에는 말 못할 사정이 있는 것 같지만... 우리에겐 지금 시간이 없다.

1000648247.english: With her breathing barely steadied, Connector Yumi gave a small nod.
1000648247.korean: - 간신히 호흡이 진정된 유미가 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000648257.english: The lingering heat alone makes my skin prickle. So that’s why Captain May of Doom insisted on delaying the landing.
1000648257.korean: 남아있는 열기만으로 피부가 따끔거려. 이래서 메이 대장이 상륙을 늦추라고 했던 거구만.

1000648258.english: Captain! We just got word from Io and A-14B Spriggan that the refugees have arrived!
1000648258.korean: 대장! 이오랑 스프리건한테서 난민들이 도착했다는 보고야!

1000648265.english: Call in Io and A-14B Spriggan.

1000648269.english: Stop saying you’re hungry, P-2000 Djinnia. We agreed to fast together.
1000648269.korean: 배고프다는 말 좀 그만해, 지니야. 같이 굶기로 했잖아.

1000648276.english: Huh? P-18 Sylphid, where did you get a chocolate bar?

1000648287.english: Ah, it’s nothing. Just earlier, P-2000 Djinnia and P-18 Sylphid protected me, right?
1000648287.korean: 아, 별건 아니에요. 방금 전에 지니야와 실피드가 저를 지켜줬잖아요?

1000648290.english: Hehe! P-18 Sylphid, your face is totally red!

1000648311.english: To your own big sister? How could you—! B-11 Night Angel!
1000648311.korean: 언니인 제게 당신이라니, 어떻게 말을...! 나이트 앤젤!

1000648318.english: While you were speaking, Colonel B-11 Night Angel and Colonel B-7 Strato Angel started a fistfight.
1000648318.korean: 말씀하시는 동안 나이트 앤젤 대령님과 스트라토 엔젤 대령님이 몸싸움을 시작했습니다.

1000648326.english: Roles remain the same as before, so remember your assignments. B-7 Strato Angel and Banshee, you’re in reserve this time. Stay at the airfield with the transport.
1000648326.korean: 맡은 역할은 방금 전이랑 다름 없으니까 각자 상기하고, 스트라토 엔젤이랑 밴시는 이번에 예비대야. 수송기가 있는 공항에서 대기해.

1000648330.english: Sending me, B-11 Night Angel, and you all out at once would be a waste.
1000648330.korean: 나랑 나이트 앤젤, 스트라토 엔젤 네가 한꺼번에 출격하는 건 낭비야.

1000648333.english: Taking that into account, B-7 Strato Angel, you’re the most suitable.
1000648333.korean: 그걸 고려했을 때 스트라토 엔젤, 네가 적격이야.

1000648338.english: Miss Connector Yumi! The first group has reached Vancouver Airport!
1000648338.korean: 유미 씨! 첫 번째 그룹이 밴쿠버 공항에 도착했대요!

1000648350.english: I still get told my reports are too stiff, but you’ll never have to worry about that, Miss Connector Yumi. I’m jealous~
1000648350.korean: 전 아직도 딱딱하다고 검수 받는데 유미씨는 그럴 걱정 없겠어요. 부럽다~

1000648357.english: And thanks to your help, Miss Connector Yumi, this operation has gone so smoothly.
1000648357.korean: 그리고 유미 씨가 도와주셔서 이번 작전이 수월하게 진행되고 있잖아요.

1000648362.english: You built it yourself, Miss Connector Yumi?!

1000648390.english: Ugh, if I keep working like this, I really might collapse. Once this mission’s over, we’ll definitely need a proper vacation for us Bioroids. I mean, Alpha, Miss Connector Yumi, and I—we’ve all been working so hard!
1000648390.korean: 어휴, 이대로 계속 일하면 진짜 쓰러질지도 몰라요. 이번 작전 끝나면 바이오로이드적으로 휴가좀 보내주셔야 할텐데. 저랑 알파 님, 그리고 유미 씨가 얼마나 고생했는데!

1000648408.english: Hearing that, I recalled what Orangeade had relayed earlier—that Connector Yumi had been in charge of developing and managing PECS’s internal comms network.
1000648408.korean: - 그 말을 들으니 조금 전 오렌지에이드에게 유미가 PECS 내부 통신망의 개발과 관리를 담당했다고 전해온 것이 떠올랐다.

1000648409.english: ...I’m sorry, Master. I don’t really know. From what I remember, Connector Yumi never spoke to anyone except Omega.
1000648409.korean: ...죄송해요, 주인님. 잘 모르겠어요. 제가 알기론, 유미는 오메가를 제외하면 다른 사람과 단 한 번도 대화하지 않았거든요.

1000648412.english: Honestly... it’s surprising. That Connector Yumi would be the one leading the refugees.
1000648412.korean: 솔직히... 좀 놀랍네요. 그 유미가 난민들을 이끌고 있다니.

1000648416.english: The intel Connector Yumi provided has been proven true as the operation progressed.
1000648416.korean: - 유미가 알려준 정보가 진실이란 건 작전이 진행되며 검증됐다.

1000648428.english: But Connector Yumi, how do you always know when the enemies are coming?
1000648428.korean: 그런데 유미 씨, 어떻게 계속 아시는 거예요? 적들이 오는 거요!

1000648435.english: Eheheh, if I wore glasses too, I’d look just as intellectual as you, Connector Yumi, right? An intellectual beauty... that’s the perfect word for me.
1000648435.korean: 에헤헷, 저도 안경을 쓰고 다니면 유미 씨처럼 되게 지적으로 보이겠죠? 이지적인 미녀... 딱 저한테 맞는 단어예요.

1000648436.english: Honestly, until now, I thought glasses were just an appearance-sealing accessory. But after meeting you, Connector Yumi, I changed my mind.
1000648436.korean: 사실 지금까지는 안경은 외모 봉인구라고 생각했거든요? 그런데 이번에 유미 씨를 만나고 생각이 바뀌었어요.

1000648442.english: Ah! That’s when I first communicated with the Commander. Eheheh, you saw too, right Connector Yumi? The Commander.
1000648442.korean: 아! 그때 처음으로 사령관님이랑 통신했어요. 에헤헤, 유미 씨도 보셨죠? 사령관님.

1000648451.english: Ah, there you are. Found you, P-2000 Djinnia! Over here, over here!
1000648451.korean: 아, 여기 있었네. 찾았어, 지니야! 여기야, 여기!

1000648460.english: Whoa~! Even P-2000 Djinnia’s here! It’s been a while.

1000648466.english: So I’ve been fasting together with P-18 Sylphid...

1000648467.english: You don’t remember eating five chocolate bars, P-2000 Djinnia?
1000648467.korean: 너 초코바 5개 먹은 거 기억 안 나, 지니야?

1000648475.english: This is Miss Connector Yumi! She’s the one who helped us in this operation!
1000648475.korean: 여기 있는 유미 씨가 바로! 이번 작전에 협력해주신 분이세요!

1000648489.english: That’s why you decided to help, right Connector Yumi? Right?
1000648489.korean: 유미 씨도 그걸 보고 도와주신거죠? 그렇죠?

1000648496.english: I’ve lost a lot because of that, but... it’s still better to regret after trying than to regret without trying, don’t you think? What about you, Connector Yumi?
1000648496.korean: 그만큼 손해도 많이 봤지만... 그래도 안 해보고 후회하는 것보다 해보고 후회하는 게 더 낫잖아요? 유미 씨는 어떻게 생각하세요?

1000648511.english: Orangeade and Connector Yumi are guiding from the rear, and things are proceeding smoothly.
1000648511.korean: 오렌지에이드와 유미가 후열에서 인도 중이고, 순조롭게 진행중이에요.

1000648544.english: Thank you as well, Connector Yumi.

1000648558.english: Connector Yumi, you were the one handling the internal work for the refugee evacuation.
1000648558.korean: 유미씨가 난민 대피와 관련된 내부 작업들을 맡아서 해주셨잖아요.

1000648608.english: A report came in that May of Doom destroyed all but one bridge leading to the airport, just as planned.
1000648608.korean: - 메이에게 예정된대로 공항으로 이어지는 다리를 하나만 남기고 파괴했다는 보고가 들어왔다.

1000648619.english: I’ll go bring Miss Daphne here. Miss Cardinal Armand, please—
1000648619.korean: 제가 다프네 양을 데려올게요. 아르망 양은 주인님을-

1000648669.english: They only believe that the chairwomen and the Lemonades fought the Iron Bugs to the very end... and that reviving them is the only way to rebuild humanity.
1000648669.korean: 회장들과 레모네이드들만이 철충과 최후까지 맞서싸운 줄 알고 있죠... 그들을 되살리는 게 인류를 재건할 수 있는 유일한 방법이라고 알고 있어요.

1000648747.english: Is A-87 Banshee thinking the same as me?

1000648751.english: Let's go, A-87 Banshee. Let's turn everything to ashes.

1000648761.english: A-15 Salamander, can’t I try it this time?
1000648761.korean: 샐러맨더, 이번엔 내가 해보면 안 돼?

1000648770.english: When we scouted, there were hardly any Iron Bugs around here, right? And even if there were, most just stayed in their own territory.
1000648770.korean: 정찰했을 땐 이 주변에 철충들이 거의 없었잖아요? 있어도 대부분 자기 구역에서 가만히 있었고요.

1000648771.english: But their movements are strange now. Some are coming in from outside the detection range, and PECS seems more concerned about the Iron Bugs than us.
1000648771.korean: 그런데 지금 움직임이 이상해요. 감지 범위 바깥에서부터 이동해오는 녀석들도 있고, PECS측도 저희보다 철충에 더 신경쓰기 시작했어요.

1000648786.english: Where did you find this fluid, A-15 Salamander?

1000648787.english: We fought a few Iron Bugs earlier, guess one still alive latched onto the Burning Walker.
1000648787.korean: 아까 철충 몇 마리랑 교전했었는데 버닝 워커에 살아있던 놈이 붙어있었나봐.

1000648790.english: Could it be that movement just now... was it trying to parasitize A-15 Salamander?
1000648790.korean: 방금 그 움직임은, 설마 샐러맨더에게 기생하려고 했던 게 아닐까요?

1000648792.english: How could a Iron Bug parasitize us? That’s impossible!
1000648792.korean: 철충이 우리한테 어떻게 기생해? 절대 무리지.

1000648809.english: The Horde is luring PECS forces inland. They reported that the Iron Bugs are becoming more active.
1000648809.korean: 호드는 내륙으로 PECS의 병력을 유인 중. 철충들이 활동적이 되어 간다고 보고했습니다.

1000648912.english: Cardinal Armand, how's the supply status for the local personnel?

1000649000.english: P-3M Undine, let’s join the fight!

1000649029.english: Cia, don’t be afraid. You will be fine.
1000649029.korean: 시아, 안 무서워. 참을 수 있어.

1000649040.english: I’ll take those! MH-4 Thetis, hold your position!
1000649040.korean: 저건 내가 처리할게! 테티스는 위치 지켜!

1000649047.english: AG-1 Nereid, Vice-Captain! Please intercept the enemy fighters heading toward the archipelago’s defense base. I’ll go intercept them too!
1000649047.korean: 네레이드, 부함장님! 군도의 방어 거점으로 향하는 적 전투기의 요격을 부탁드려요. 저도 요격하러 갈게요!

1000649052.english: AG-1 Nereid, what’s your ammo status?

1000649055.english: MH-4 Thetis and P-3M Undine, support the Mermaids who’ve pushed forward!
1000649055.korean: 테티스랑 운디네는 돌출된 머메이드 분들을 지원해주세요!

1000649079.english: V-Vice-Commander. AG-1 Nereid’s ammo belts are almost gone!
1000649079.korean: 부, 부함장님. 네리가 가져온 탄띠가 다 떨어져 가고 있어.

1000649362.english: All turrets have been neutralized, Gamma.

1000649365.english: So you’re going to stay like this until the very end?

1000649366.english: Fine, then I’ll give up too. But in exchange…!
1000649366.korean: 좋아, 그렇다면 나도 포기하겠어. 그 대신...!

1000649368.english: ...! The flagship’s energy signature… no way…!

1000649369.english: Emergency situation! We must stop Gamma before he causes the fusion reactor to go critical!
1000649369.korean: 긴급상황이오! 감마가 핵융합로를 폭주시키기 전에 막아야 하오!

1000649370.english: I’ll eliminate everything that makes you weak. After that…
1000649370.korean: 널 약하게 만드는 것들은 내가 모조리 없애주겠어. 그 다음에...

1000649383.english: On screen appeared a Iron Bug designated “Speaker,” surrounded by a swarm of its kind.
1000649383.korean: - 스피커라고 명명한 철충과, 그 주위에 무리지어 있는 철충들의 모습이 화면에 떠올랐다.

1000649388.english: When I checked Orca’s logs, it was recorded that only you, Commander, could hear the words of the Iron Bugs...
1000649388.korean: 제가 오르카 호의 기록을 확인했을 때, 철충의 말은 사령관님만 들을 수 있는데다가...

1000649392.english: It’s being... attacked by another Iron Bug...?

1000649393.english: Among the swarm around the Speaker, a Iron Bug designated “Harvester” brought its massive arm crashing down on it.
1000649393.korean: - 스피커의 주위에 모여들어 있던 철충들 중, '하베스터'라고 명명된 철충이 스피커를 육중한 팔로 내려쳤다.

1000649406.english: In the crossfire between nearby Iron Bugs, a stray grenade struck the comms server room, and Yumi lost consciousness from the blast.
1000649406.korean: - 인근 철충들이 상잔을 벌이다 발사된 유탄이 통신망 서버실을 직격했고, 유미는 그 충격으로 정신을 잃었다.

1000649448.english: After the Invincible Dragon departed, Gamma spent a while laying waste to the city, watching the Iron Bugs tearing into each other and the resistance fleet detachments slipping out through the strait toward the open sea.
1000649448.korean: - 무적의 용이 떠난 뒤, 감마는 한동안 도시를 마구 파괴하며 서로 싸우는 철충들과 해협을 빠져나가 바다로 향하는 저항군의 분함대를 바라보고 있었다.

1000649458.english: Taking into account the Iron Bugs’ movements and the terrain, we are calculating the rendezvous point...
1000649458.korean: 철충들의 움직임과 지형을 고려해 합류 지점을 계산중입니다만...

1000649459.english: At Cardinal Armand’s words, I checked the tactical map.

1000649463.english: I zoomed in on the area around the estuary Cardinal Armand had mentioned.
1000649463.korean: - 아르망이 언급한 하구 주변 지리를 확대하여 살펴봤다.

1000649464.english: Though the passage was narrow enough that the fleet would have to pass single-file, there weren’t many Iron Bugs nearby. For a short time, it was a suitable place to dock and pick up the Horde.
1000649464.korean: - 함대가 일렬로 지나가야 할 만큼 좁은 길목이어도 주변에 철충들이 많지 않았다. 짧은 시간 동안은 정박해서 호드를 태우기 적합한 위치였다.

1000649466.english: Master, we just received an emergency transmission from Lady Prester Johanna!
1000649466.korean: 주인님, 방금 전에 요안나 양으로부터 긴급 통신이 들어왔어요!

1000649467.english: Judging from the “words” we heard from the Speaker earlier, it’s no exaggeration to say that something has gone wrong with all the Iron Bugs. Which means...
1000649467.korean: - 조금전, 스피커의 '말'을 들어봤을때, 모든 철충들에게 이상이 생겼다고 생각해도 무리가 아니다. 그렇다는건…

1000649469.english: Speaking quickly, I scanned the map. For now, somewhere we can avoid as many Iron Bugs as possible...
1000649469.korean: - 말을 하며 급히 지도를 살폈다. 일단 최대한 철충을 피할 수 있는 곳으로…

1000649473.english: Troops landed from the Orca at the river estuary, but the Horde had not managed to cover even half of their planned distance due to the Iron Bug attacks.
1000649473.korean: - 강의 하구로 진입한 오르카 호에서 부대가 상륙했지만, 호드는 철충들의 공격에 예상 이동 거리의 반도 이동하지 못했다.

1000649475.english: Khan the Swift and the Horde are still holding out well, but there are limits to their ammunition and stamina.
1000649475.korean: - 칸과 호드는 여전히 잘 버텨주고 있지만, 탄약과 체력에는 한계가 있다.

1000649476.english: To bring them safely back to the Orca, the scale of the force we send will have to be larger, which means they’ll face an even greater swarm of Iron Bugs.
1000649476.korean: - 그들을 무사히 오르카까지 데려오려면 보내야 하는 부대의 규모도 커지고, 그러면 더욱 더 큰 규모의 철충과 싸우게 된다.

1000649478.english: While anxiously waiting for Cardinal Armand to draw up an operational plan from the terrain data, a communication request came in from outside.
1000649478.korean: - 초조하게 지형 정보를 통해 작전 계획을 세우는 아르망을 기다리는 중에, 외부에서 통신 요청이 들어왔다.

1000649482.english: The situation isn’t exactly relaxed, so I’ll get straight to the point. Could you call Prototype Labiata?
1000649482.korean: 상황이 여유롭지 않으니까 본론부터 말할게요. 라비아타를 불러주시겠어요?

1000649484.english: ...Indeed, if it were me, I could break through the Iron Bugs and link up with the Horde.
1000649484.korean: ...확실히, 저라면 철충들을 돌파해서 호드와 합류할 수 있어요.

1000649485.english: Facing Prototype Labiata, Eva advised not to land troops to retrieve the Horde, but to send Prototype Labiata to join them instead.
1000649485.korean: - 라비아타와 마주한 에바는 부대를 상륙시켜 호드를 복귀시키는 것이 아니라, 라비아타를 보내 호드에 합류시킬 것을 권했다.

1000649488.english: I recalled how Eva had once given me a hint that led to Prototype Labiata’s treatment.
1000649488.korean: - 에바가 라비아타를 치료할 수 있는 힌트를 알려주었던 일이 떠올랐다.

1000649496.english: Once Prototype Labiata joins the Horde, I’ll contact you again. At that time, I’ll tell you what needs to be done.
1000649496.korean: 라비아타가 호드와 합류하면 다시 연락할게요. 그때, 무엇을 해야하는지 알려드리죠.

1000649502.english: I gave the order for the landed units to return, then turned my gaze to Prototype Labiata.
1000649502.korean: - 상륙해있던 부대에 복귀 지시를 내리고 라비아타에게 시선을 주었다.

1000649512.english: It’s cleared, let’s keep moving. Be careful not to draw the Iron Bugs’ attention.
1000649512.korean: 정리됐으니 계속 이동하죠. 철충들의 주의를 끌지 않도록 조심하세요.

1000649518.english: They’ll make it safely, right? They’re setting out from practically the heart of the Iron Bugs’ nest in the continent...
1000649518.korean: 무사히 도착할 수 있겠죠? 철충의 본거지나 다름 없는 대륙 한복판에서 출발할텐데...

1000649519.english: Of course. They’re as strong and dutiful in their roles as Lancer Mina and X-00 Tiamat.
1000649519.korean: 그럼요. 미나랑 티아멧만큼이나 강하고 맡은 바 역할에 충실한 분들이니까요.

1000649552.english: How have you been, Khan the Swift?

1000649567.english: But before that, answer me first, Prototype Labiata. You asked what you thought was important—so why didn’t you call the Commander here to hear it together?
1000649567.korean: 하지만 그 전에 내가 묻는 것부터 먼저 답해. 라비아타. 너는 네가 중요하다고 생각하는 걸 물어봤으면서 왜 사령관을 불러 같이 들으려고 하지 않지?

1000649588.english: And Khan the Swift the Swift.

1000649591.english: Prototype Labiata, protecting the Commander is not your role. There’s someone else meant for that.
1000649591.korean: 라비아타, 사령관을 보살피는건 네 역할이 아냐. 그 역할을 맡을 사람은 따로 있지.

1000649607.english: I’ll continue. Send Prototype Labiata and Khan the Swift to the Ruins of the Iron Throne.
1000649607.korean: 계속할게요. 라비아타와 칸은 철의 왕자의 유적으로 보내세요.

1000649611.english: It was the site where the Irregular known as the Iron Prince had appeared. With the Iron Bugs rampaging now, there’s no telling what might happen there again.
1000649611.korean: - 철의 왕자라는 이레귤러가 발생했던 장소인데, 철충이 날뛰는 지금 또 어떤 일이 일어날지 모른다.

1000649617.english: At my words, Khan the Swift smiled faintly.
1000649617.korean: - 내 말에 칸은 빙그레 미소를 지었다.

1000649626.english: I agree. Besides, there don’t seem to be many Iron Bugs crossing the mountain range toward the sea, so we can focus entirely on movement.
1000649626.korean: 저도 동의해요. 거기에 산맥을 넘어서 바다 쪽으로 오는 철충도 거의 없는 것 같으니까 움직이는데에만 전념할 수 있을 거예요.

1000649673.english: Then let’s depart immediately, Deputy Commander Prototype Labiata.

1000649679.english: After finishing communications with Prototype Labiata, Khan the Swift, and Eva, I headed toward the rendezvous point.
1000649679.korean: - 라비아타, 칸, 에바와의 통신을 마치고 약속 지점으로 향했다.

1000649723.english: Since Prototype Labiata’s resistance activities overlapped with that area too, most of the surviving Bioroids we ran into responded favorably.
1000649723.korean: - 거기에 라비아타의 저항군 활동 범위와 겹치기도 해서, 마주치게 되는 생존 바이오로이드들은 대체로 우호적인 반응을 보였다.

1000649734.english: Cardinal Armand, can you hear this too?

1000649739.english: It must be because of the Iron Bugs. How's the Horde?

1000649760.english: Got it. Then... Prototype Labiata, I'm counting on you.

1000649768.english: Kan, Prototype Labiata. We're heading to our current location...

1000649789.english:
So you like this outfit that much, Commander?
Huh? It’s not the outfit… it’s me?
Uu… I like you too, Commander.
I was going to say I’d be your maid forever… but no.
Right now, I’m not your maid or your deputy…
Just as a girl… I love you.
So… will you stay with me today too?
1000649789.korean: 역시 주인님이 이런 마음을 품으실 정도로 이 옷이 마음에 드시는 거죠?​ 네? 의상 때문이 아니라… 저라서? 으으...&n저도 주인님을 정말 좋아해요. 평생 주인님만을 위한 메이드가- ...아뇨. 이 순간만큼은 메이드도 부함장도 아니라…&n한 명의 여자아이로써, 저도 사령관님을 사랑하고 있어요.  그러니... 오늘도 저와 함께해 주실 거죠?

1000649795.english: The abnormal behavior of The Iron Bugs still bothers me.
1000649795.korean: - 철충들이 보인 이상현상이 아직도 맘에 걸린다.

1000649796.english: - The ferocity of attacking the Bioroids that were staying still first, and on top of that, the Iron Bugs fought each other...
1000649796.korean: - 가만히 있던 바이오로이드를 먼저 공격하는 흉포성, 그리고 같은 철충끼리 상잔을 벌인 데다가...

1000649798.english: - There is no doubt that a new existence appeared and caused changes in the Iron Bugs.
1000649798.korean: - 새로운 존재가 등장해서 철충들에게 변화가 일어난 건 틀림 없다.

1000649799.english: - The reason why my squad and I understood the Iron Bugs' language through the screen and why various unusual phenomena occurred is likely the same.
1000649799.korean: - 나와 대원들이 화면 너머로 철충의 말을 알아들은 것도, 갖가지 특이현상이 일어난 것도 모두 같은 이유에서일 것이다.

1000649858.english: - Perhaps because it was originally a sparsely populated area, or because they were fighting among themselves, no Iron Bug signals were detected nearby.
1000649858.korean: - 원래부터 인구가 희박한 지역이었기 때문인지, 자기들끼리 싸우고 있어서인지 주변에서 철충 신호는 감지되지 않았다.

1000649978.english: What are you doing here? Ah, right! Hachiko of Castling just baked a new meat pie, would you like one?
1000649978.korean: 여기서 뭐하고 계세요? 아 참! 하치코가 새로 미트 파이를 구웠는데, 하나 드실래요?

1000649982.english: No, Hachiko of Castling doesn't know anything.

1000649983.english: As I stared blankly, Hachiko of Castling avoided my gaze and eventually closed her eyes.
1000649983.korean: - 물끄러미 바라보니, 하치코는 내 시선을 피하다 결국엔 눈을 감아 버렸다.

1000649985.english: I held out one of the "Wish Coupons" Hachiko of Castling had given me.
1000649985.korean: - 하치코에게 선물 받은 '소원 쿠폰' 중 한 장을 내밀었다.

1000649986.english: Waaah! Even though it was Hachiko of Castling who said it…! But…!

1000649992.english: Huh? Hachiko of Castling, you haven't gained weight!

1000649996.english: Um… can I eat the remaining meatball vegetable stir-fry, Hachiko of Castling?
1000649996.korean: 우음... 남은 미트볼 야채볶음 하치코가 먹어도 돼요?

1000650008.english: Yes, delicious fried eggs! Hachiko of Castling also helped make them in the kitchen.
1000650008.korean: 네, 맛있는 계란 프라이! 하치코도 주방에서 만드는 걸 도왔어요.

1000650017.english: Ah! That's right! Master, whenever Hachiko of Castling thinks "I want to be petted…" he pets me, and whenever I think "I want a treat," he gives me one!
1000650017.korean: 아! 맞아요! 주인님은 하치코가 쓰다듬어줬으면... 하고 생각하면 쓰다듬어주고, 간식 먹고 싶다고 생각하면 간식 줘요!

1000650022.english: Hachiko of Castling, can you watch too?

1000650023.english: Hehe, if it's Hachiko of Castling, I'll allow it anytime.

1000650037.english: Eh, did you forget the promised place? Then Hachiko of Castling will tell you where it is!
1000650037.korean: 에에, 약속 장소 까먹으신 거예요? 그럼 하치코가 어딘지 알려 드릴게요!

1000650039.english: The place Hachiko of Castling told me was the summit of a nearby mountain. There's an aerial garden at the very top, and Hirume said she would be waiting there.
1000650039.korean: - 하치코가 알려준 장소는 멀지 않은 곳의 산 정상이었다. 맨 꼭대기에 공중정원이 있고 히루메는 거기서 기다리는 중이라고 했다.

1000650122.english: As B-11 Night Angel said, I also have complexes. Sometimes it makes me feel depressed or angry.
1000650122.korean: 나이트 앤젤의 말대로 저도 콤플렉스가 있죠. 그것 때문에 가끔은 우울해지기도, 화가 나기도 하고요.

1000650146.english: B-11 Night Angel, you like to sing, don't you?
1000650146.korean: 나이트 앤젤은 노래 부르는 거 좋아하잖아요?

1000650148.english: Appearance isn't the only thing that determines a person's charm, is it? And I know B-11 Night Angel's songs well.
1000650148.korean: 외모만이 그 사람의 매력을 정하는 건 아니잖아요? 그리고 나이트 앤젤의 노래는 제가 잘 알아요.

1000650150.english: ... Oh, anyway. How B-11 Night Angel chooses to accept it is up to them.
1000650150.korean: ...어, 어쨌든. 어떻게 받아들일지는 나이트 앤젤의 몫이에요.

1000650169.english: ... Hey, B-11 Night Angel? Are you going to keep singing like that without lyrics?
1000650169.korean: ...저기 나이트 앤젤? 계속 가사 없이 그렇게 부를 건가요?

1000650175.english: I, I thought I could be helpful to B-11 Night Angel...
1000650175.korean: 저, 저는 나이트 앤젤에게 도움이 될 거라고 생각해서...

1000650189.english: Then, how about asking Ms. Audrey Dreamweaver...?
1000650189.korean: 그럼 오드리 양에게 부탁해 보는 건...

1000650192.english: Anyway, Ms. Audrey Dreamweaver is busy right now and won't be able to take on any new orders.
1000650192.korean: 어차피 오드리 양은 지금 바빠서 수주받을 수는 없을 거고요.

1000650193.english: Yes, that's right. Ms. Audrey Dreamweaver definitely said she was busy, didn't she? But we'll need stage costumes... Oh!
1000650193.korean: 그, 그랬었죠. 오드리 양은 분명 바쁘다고 했었죠. 하지만 무대 의상은 필요할 텐데... 아!

1000650204.english: B-11 Night Angel's songs are good enough. That's something not just I know, but all the Doom Bringers know -
1000650204.korean: 나이트 앤젤의 노래는 충분히 좋다고요. 그건 저뿐만 아니라 둠 브링어 모두가 알고 있고-

1000650209.english: B-11 Night Angel. The package has arrived.

1000650229.english: - B-11 Night Angel, who was in her stage costume and checking the choreography, approached me.
1000650229.korean: - 무대 의상을 입고 동선을 체크하고 있던 나이트 앤젤이 내게 다가왔다.

1000650232.english: - B-11 Night Angel chuckled at my stiff, mechanical-sounding answer.
1000650232.korean: - 기계음처럼 뻣뻣한 내 대답에 나이트 앤젤은 피식 웃었다.

1000650234.english: - Embarrassed by the gaze that was looking at me with a slight smile, I averted my eyes. The B-11 Night Angel then took another step closer to me.
1000650234.korean: - 살짝 미소를 머금고 나를 바라보는 시선에 민망해져서 눈을 피하자, 나이트 앤젤은 한 걸음 더 내게 다가왔다.

1000650242.english: - B-11 Night Angel slowly embraced me, wrapping her hands around my waist.
1000650242.korean: - 나이트 앤젤은 두 손을 내 허리에 감으며 천천히 내게 안겼다.

1000650246.english: - He bowed his head and slowly brought his face closer to B-11 Night Angel.
1000650246.korean: - 고개를 숙여 나이트 앤젤에게 천천히 얼굴을 가까이했다.

1000650254.english: - Small lights gather to fill the concert hall, and B-11 Night Angel takes the stage, shining brightly.
1000650254.korean: - 작은 빛이 모여 공연장을 가득 채우고, 밝게 빛나는 무대 위로 나이트 앤젤이 올라선다.

1000650256.english: - But as if that were enough, B-11 Night Angel, with a slight smile, took a small breath.
1000650256.korean: - 하지만 그걸로 충분하다는 듯이, 살짝 미소 지은 나이트 앤젤은 작게 숨을 들이마셨다.

1000650258.english: - But in the voice of the B-11 Night Angel singing on the shining stage,
1000650258.korean: - 하지만 빛나는 무대에 올라 노래하는 밤천사의 목소리에는,

1000650286.english: Please, Hachiko of Castling. What did you talk about with Hirume?
1000650286.korean: 부탁할게, 하치코. 히루메랑 무슨 얘길 했어?

1000650343.english: Me, Captain May of Doom is... isn't she very busy...?
1000650343.korean: 메, 메이 대장님은… 많이 바쁘시지 않나요…?

1000650352.english: I saw it recently because P-22 Harpyia recommended it.

1000650362.english: - Lost in thought, I snapped back to reality and saw May of Doom looking up at me with a displeased expression.
1000650362.korean: - 상념에 빠졌다 정신을 차려보니, 메이가 못마땅하다는 얼굴로 올려다보고 있었다.

1000650364.english: - May of Doom has no idea I was lost in thought because of her.
1000650364.korean: - 메이는 내가 딴생각에 빠진 게 본인 때문이란걸 꿈에도 모르겠지.

1000650366.english: - It's already been over two years since I met May of Doom.

1000650367.english: - Their bumpy first meeting and the happenings after May of Doom realizes her feelings as a girl.
1000650367.korean: - 순탄치 않았던 첫만남과, 메이가 자신의 소녀로서의 마음을 깨닫고 나서의 해프닝들.

1000650369.english: - Although May of Doom has shown many different sides, lately she feels quite different from before.
1000650369.korean: - 여러가지 모습을 보여준 메이지만, 요즘은 지금까지와는 사뭇 다른 느낌이다.

1000650371.english: - May of Doom, who doesn't hide her shyness and affection while still maintaining her former confidence, is truly-
1000650371.korean: - 쑥쓰러움과 호감을 숨기지 않으면서도, 예전의 당당한 모습을 유지하는 메이는 정말로-

1000650373.english: - The sound of May of Doom slamming her desk brought me back to reality.
1000650373.korean: - 메이가 책상을 탕 내려치는 소리에 다시 현실로 돌아왔다.

1000650378.english: - May of Doom cut me off and took a small, deep breath.
1000650378.korean: - 메이는 내 말을 자르고 작게 심호흡했다.

1000650379.english: - At first, I saw the old May of Doom, who seemed passive and shy, but soon her unwavering gaze turned toward me.
1000650379.korean: - 언뜻 소극적이고 부끄럼 많은, 예전의 메이가 보였지만, 곧 흔들림없는 시선이 내게 향했다.

1000650384.english: - As I just blinked my eyes in a daze, the corners of May of Doom's eyes began to tremble slightly.
1000650384.korean: - 황망하게 눈만 깜빡이고 있자니, 메이의 눈가가 가늘게 떨렸다.

1000650394.english: - May of Doom, dressed in comfortable casual clothes, plopped down next to me.
1000650394.korean: - 편안한 사복을 걸친 메이가 내 옆에 털썩 앉았다.

1000650396.english: - I took the can of beer May of Doom handed me and sat down next to her.
1000650396.korean: - 메이가 건낸 맥주캔을 받아 나도 메이 옆에 자리를 잡았다.

1000650404.english: - Before I could even answer, May of Doom gently took my hand.
1000650404.korean: - 미처 대답하기도 전에, 메이가 조심스레 손을 잡았다.

1000650410.english: - As I approached, May of Doom didn't resist and embraced me.
1000650410.korean: - 내가 다가가자 메이는 저항하지 않고 품에 안겼다.

1000650411.english: - May of Doom, who had been burying her nose in my chest and fiddling with my clothes for a while, pulled away with a bright red face.
1000650411.korean: - 한동안 내 가슴팍에 코를 묻고 옷자락을 만지작거리던 메이가 새빨개진 얼굴로 몸을 뗐다.

1000650414.english: - Not just the guitar, but I remembered that Sleipnir had told me that the fortress P-22 Harpyia and the Muses often hung out with May of Doom.
1000650414.korean: - 기타 뿐만이 아니라, 슬레이프니르에게 요새 하르페이아와 뮤즈가 메이랑 자주 어울린다는 이야기를 들었던 것을 떠올렸다.

1000650416.english: - May of Doom's fingers, holding the guitar, were wrapped in bandages.
1000650416.korean: - 기타를 잡는 메이의 손가락에는 밴드가 감겨있었다.

1000650418.english: - Smiling faintly and making a joke that wasn't quite a joke, May of Doom gently closed her eyes and began to sing.
1000650418.korean: - 살풋웃으며 농담같지 않은 농담을 건넨 메이는, 살며시 눈을 감고 노래하기 시작했다.

1000650422.english: - When our eyes met while she was singing, May of Doom's bashful smile made me involuntarily hold my breath.
1000650422.korean: - 노래하며 눈이 마주치자 배시시 웃는 메이의 모습에 나도 모르게 숨을 삼켰다.

1000650424.english: - As if trying to convey her sincerity, May of Doom's captivating purple eyes, which seemed to draw you in, were fixed on me until the song ended.
1000650424.korean: - 마치 진심을 전하려는 듯, 빨려들어갈 것 같은 메이의 보랏빛 눈동자는 노래가 끝날때까지 나만을 바라보고 있었다.

1000650426.english: - After the song ended, May of Doom asked cautiously.

1000650428.english: Seeing May of Doom lower her gaze and blush, I decided to answer in a different way.
1000650428.korean: - 시선을 내리깔고 볼을 붉히는 메이를 보며, 다른 방식으로 대답하기로 했다.

1000650430.english: - The body of May of Doom, held in his arms, stiffened with tension, confusion, and surprise.
1000650430.korean: - 품에 안은 메이의 몸이 긴장과 당황, 놀람으로 빳빳하게 굳어졌다.

1000650432.english: - Slowly, their lips parted, and May of Doom, letting out a small gasp...
1000650432.korean: - 천천히 입술이 떨어지고, 작게 탄성을 내뱉은 메이는…

1000650436.english: - After fidgeting with her fingers for a moment, May of Doom finally looked me straight in the eye.
1000650436.korean: - 잠시 손가락을 꼼지락대던 메이는, 이내 나를 똑바로 바라봤다.

1000650450.english: - May of Doom blushed and whispered in a barely audible voice.
1000650450.korean: - 메이는 얼굴을 붉히고 기어들어가는 목소리로 속삭였다.

1000650455.english: - The May of Doom he picked up was literally as light as a feather.
1000650455.korean: - 안아든 메이는 말 그대로 깃털처럼 가벼웠다.

1000650459.english: - May of Doom's room, the consciousness that had been half-asleep was awakened again by a knock.
1000650459.korean: - 메이의 방, 반쯤 잠들었던 의식이 노크소리에 다시 깨어났다.

1000650463.english: - Am I mistaken...? It looks like B-11 Night Angel's body is becoming blurry.
1000650463.korean: - 착각인가... 나이트 앤젤의 몸이 흐릿해지는 것 같은데.

1000650469.english: - I stroked May of Doom's cheek as she slept soundly.

1000650471.english: - Still sleep-talking, May of Doom tightly grasped my index finger and fell back asleep.
1000650471.korean: - 잠꼬대를 하던 메이는 내 검지 손가락을 꼬옥 쥔 채 다시 잠들었다.

1000650477.english: - After exchanging a few more words, B-11 Night Angel went out into the hallway and quietly closed the door.
1000650477.korean: - 그렇게 몇 마디를 더 나누고, 나이트 앤젤은 복도로 나가 조용히 문을 닫았다.

1000650478.english: - Then I should get some sleep before May of Doom wakes up.
1000650478.korean: - 그럼 메이가 일어나기 전에 좀 눈을 붙여놔야겠군.

1000650480.english: - At least for today, I don't intend to let go of May of Doom either.
1000650480.korean: - 적어도 오늘 하루동안은, 나도 메이를 놓아줄 생각이 없으니까.

1000650489.english: No. Okay. I also want to be alone with May of Doom.
1000650489.korean: 아냐. 좋아. 나도 메이랑 단 둘이 있고 싶어.

1000650509.english: ... On the way, May of Doom said she wanted to wear it and do it.

1000650512.english: Okay. They're both May of Doom.

1000650515.english: Have you fallen for T-13 Alvis’ cool looks? Hmm~ What should I do? Bodyguards must never fall in love... hehe. But with the Commander it’s okay! T-13 Alvis will stick close to the Commander from now on. Whatever danger comes to the Commander, T-13 Alvis will protect you!
1000650515.korean: 알비스의 멋진 모습에 반해버린 거야? 으음~ 어떡하지? 보디가드는 절대 사랑에 빠지면&n안 된다고 했는데... 히히힛. 사령관님이면 괜찮아! 알비스는 앞으로도 사령관님이랑 꼭 붙어 다닐 거야.&n사령관님에게 어떤 위험이 오더라도 알비스가 지켜줄게!

1000650645.english: Hmm~? I wonder what P-3M Undine is worried about~?

1000650655.english: What's with you, P-3M Undine, when did you lose confidence like that?
1000650655.korean: 뭐야~ 운디네, 언제부터 그렇게 자신 없어졌어.

1000650657.english: What about MH-4 Thetis? Are you confident?

1000650677.english: And just to be clear, you didn't just think of that now, P-3M Undine? Hmm~?
1000650677.korean: 그리고 혹시나 해서 묻는 건데 방금 생각해낸 건 아니지, 운디네? 으응~?

1000650697.english: So MH-4 Thetis suggested the outfit…

1000650705.english: The idea came from P-3M Undine, Vice Commander!

1000650707.english: Kya-haha! Amazing, P-3M Undine. Great work.

1000650717.english: Ah, now that I think about it, didn't P-3M Undine make a dessert for the Commander before?
1000650717.korean: 아, 그러고 보니 운디네가 예전에 사령관님을 위해서 디저트를 만든 적 있지 않나요?

1000650720.english: P-3M Undine, you're actually good at cooking!

1000650722.english: Kya-haha! What the… P-3M Undine, why didn't you say anything until now?
1000650722.korean: 꺄하핫! 뭐야, 운디네. 여태 말 안 하고 뭐했어.

1000650727.english: Then P-3M Undine will handle coffee and desserts in the kitchen, and we'll take care of everything else.
1000650727.korean: 그럼 주방에서 커피랑 디저트는 운디네가 담당하고, 다른 건 저희가 맡도록 하죠.

1000650733.english: Go anytime, Chef. P-3M Undine's role is crucial this time!
1000650733.korean: 얼마든지 다녀오세요, 주방장님. 이번에 운디네의 역할이 중요한 걸요!

1000650748.english: T-2 Brownie, how are things on your end?

1000650750.english: Corporal T-3 Leprechaun, did you find something?
1000650750.korean: 레프리콘 상병님은 뭔가 발견한 게 있슴까?

1000650758.english: Sergeant T-50 PX Silky, you're here!

1000650760.english: Did you find anything on Sergeant T-50 PX Silky's side?

1000650764.english: T-2 Brownie, did you find something?!

1000650772.english: ... No, T-2 Brownie has a point too.

1000650785.english: Sergeant T-50 PX Silky, you're really cute...!

1000650787.english: I, I'm fine with this. Would you like to try a T-2 Brownie too?
1000650787.korean: 저, 저는 이거면 충분해요. 브라우니도 한번 써보실래요?

1000650816.english: Corporal T-50 PX Silky, is what T-2 Brownie said true?

1000650825.english: That's what's good about Sergeant T-20S Gnome.
1000650825.korean: 그 점이 노움 병장님의 좋은 점이죠.

1000650826.english: Sergeant T-50 PX Silky, do you think the same way I do?

1000650833.english: Oh, Sergeant M-5 Efreeti! Did you come?

1000650922.english: It's mealtime. Master Sergeant AA-7 Impet says to assemble.

1000650935.english: Okay, let's eat and then continue... But Sergeant T-50 PX Silky...
1000650935.korean: 좋아, 식사하고 계속하자... 그런데 실키 상병.

1000650957.english: Corporal T-50 PX Silky, was the expiration date on the ingredients a bit old? Corporal Ifrit's condition is strange.
1000650957.korean: 실키 상병, 혹시 재료의 유통기한이 좀 오래 됐던 건가요? 이프리트 병장님 상태가 이상해요.

1000651053.english: You're even perfect at pretending to be dead... Okay, T-20S Gnome...

1000651069.english: In that sense, T-20S Gnome, you... You were the best student...
1000651069.korean: 그런 의미에서 노움, 넌... 최고의 제자였어...

1000651081.english: All the effort you've put in so far should be rewarded... Understood, Sergeant T-20S Gnome...?
1000651081.korean: 그간 해온 노력 다 보답 받아야 해... 알겠지, 노움 병장...?

1000651086.english: You have to take care of yourself, Sergeant T-20S Gnome...

1000651099.english: That M-5 Efreeti... The more I see it, the more it seems fitting for a non-commissioned officer.
1000651099.korean: 이프리트 녀석... 보면 볼수록 부사관에 걸맞단 말이야.

1000651119.english: What about the B-7 Strato Angels?

1000651138.english: Come to think of it, B-11 Night Angel seems to have a good figure... There's not much excess fat...
1000651138.korean: 그러고 보니 나이트 앤젤, 몸매가 좋은 것 같은데... 군살도 적고...

1000651166.english: B-7 Strato Angel. I didn't tense my stomach. Brace your core.
1000651166.korean: 스트라토 엔젤. 배에 힘 안 줬어요. 배에 힘.

1000651169.english: What exactly is B-11 Night Angel...? How can I hold on?
1000651169.korean: 도대체 나이트 앤젤은... 어떻게 버틸 수 있죠?

1000651179.english: B-11 Night Angel. I... What about me?

1000651206.english: But B-11 Night Angel said you shouldn't eat late at night...
1000651206.korean: 하지만 늦은 시간에 먹으면 안 된다고 나이트 앤젤이...

1000651218.english: ... B-7 Strato Angel. Let's weigh you.

1000651243.english: B-7 Strato Angel, from now on, you must trust me completely.
1000651243.korean: 스트라토 엔젤, 지금부터는 저를 전적으로 믿어야합니다.

1000651248.english: Then this way... If you follow the instructions of the B-7 Strato Angel well, it's an exercise you can enjoy.
1000651248.korean: 그럼 이쪽으로... 스트라토 엔젤만 잘 따라준다면 즐겁게 할 수 있는 운동입니다.

1000651255.english: Hey, isn't this the commander's room? B-11 Night Angel? I've come to the wrong place...
1000651255.korean: 여, 여기는 사령관님 방인데요? 나이트 앤젤? 잘못 찾아온 게...

1000651256.english: It's the right one. ... Commander, this is B-11 Night Angel.
1000651256.korean: 제대로 온 게 맞습니다. ...사령관님, 나이트 앤젤입니다.

1000651264.english: - Looking at B-7 Strato Angel, she was lowering her head with a slight blush on her face.
1000651264.korean: - 스트라토 엔젤을 쳐다보자, 그녀는 얼굴을 약간 붉힌 채로 고개를 떨구고 있었다.

1000651269.english: Why are you pushing all of a sudden? B-11 Night Angel!

1000651271.english: B-11 Night Angel! They said they'd teach me how to exercise, and then they suddenly do this...
1000651271.korean: 나이트 앤젤! 운동을 알려준다면서 갑자기 이러기나 하고...

1000651274.english: - I can feel the piercing gaze of B-11 Night Angel.

1000651276.english: - Having finished speaking, B-11 Night Angel left the room as he was.
1000651276.korean: - 말을 마친 나이트 앤젤은 그대로 방을 나섰다.

1000651278.english: Um... Commander? The exercise B-11 Night Angel mentioned...
1000651278.korean: 저... 사령관님? 나이트 앤젤이 말한 운동이라는 게...

1000651287.english: Yes! B-11 Night Angel told me.

1000651574.english: At Cardinal Armand's words, I took my eyes off the tactical map and stood up from my seat.
1000651574.korean: - 아르망의 말에 전술지도에서 눈을 떼고 자리에서 일어났다.

1000651624.english: I just like staying in my room, drinking CoCo & WhiteShella, and playing board games...
1000651624.korean: 나는 그냥 방에서 코코아 마시면서 보드게임 하는 게 좋은데에...

1000651701.english: After recovering the genes of the target recognition names 'Audrey Dreamweaver', 'Olivia Starsewer', and 'Taylor Clothcut', Lemonade Delta thoroughly destroyed the remaining genes.
1000651701.korean: ......레모네이드 델타는 목적이었던 인식명 '오드리 드림위버', '올리비아 스타수어', '테일러 클로스컷'의 유전자를 회수한 후, 남은 유전자들은 철저히 파괴했습니다.

1000651835.english: - The large bird-shaped AGS flew around, fighting the Iron Bugs.
1000651835.korean: - 커다란 새 형태의 AGS는 이리저리 날아다니며 철충을 상대했다.

1000651862.english: Before the Iron Bugs showed up, you could say we were on the same side, more or less...
1000651862.korean: 철충들이 나타나기 전까지는 뭐, 굳이 말하자면 같은 편이라고 할 수있었지만...

1000651866.english: That guy was probably talking about the Iron Bugs when he said that, but he got caught up in his own world-building and gave the order in this grandiose way, and that came back to bite us.
1000651866.korean: 그 양반은 철충을 의도하고 말한 거겠지만, 지가 만든 설정에 취해서 굳이 멋들어지게 명령하려던 게 화를 불렀지.

1000651872.english: I don't know how this'll sound, but… getting killed by the Iron Bugs might actually be cleaner.
1000651872.korean: 이런말을 하면 어떨지 모르겠지만, 철충한테 당하는 게 차라리 더 깔끔할걸.

1000651909.english: - While I was debating whether to draw my gun from my holster, taking a cue from Vanilla A1, Alfred and Peregrinus continued their friendly conversation as if they were a famous actor and his fan.
1000651909.korean: - 내가 바닐라를 본받아 홀스터에서 총을 뽑을까 말까 고민하는 동안 알프레드와 페레그리누스는 마치 유명 배우와 그 팬처럼 화기애애하게 대화를 이어갔다.

1000651917.english: ... That's right. The reason I endured that hardship and lived thru all the humiliation and oppression under the Commander and Miss Vanilla A1...
1000651917.korean: ...그렇습니다. 제가 그 고초를 겪고, 사령관님과 바닐라 양 밑에서 온갖 모멸과 핍박을 견뎌내며 살아온 것은…

1000651954.english: ... Yes. The Arctic expedition team and the AGS Glacias encountered a walrus off the coast of the island.
1000651954.korean: ...네. 북극 탐험대와 AGS 글라시아스가 섬 외곽에서 장화와 조우했어요.

1000651959.english: - Specifically, JangHwa and Cheona, who were in the same unit, helped with the withdrawal operation.
1000651959.korean: - 바로 장화, 그리고 같은 부대 소속인 천아가 철수 작전에 도움을 주었다는 것.

1000651963.english: - JangHwa and Cheona remained in a secluded corner of the transport ship and took no other action.
1000651963.korean: - 장화와 천아는 수송선 구석진 곳에 머물러 있을 뿐, 별다른 행동을 취하지 않았다.

1000651964.english: - Oh, T-50 PX Silky did make a sad face because some of the hand warmers were missing.
1000651964.korean: - 아, 핫팩이 몇 개씩 비어서 실키가 울상을 짓긴 했지만.

1000652011.english: - After silently watching the Arctic expedition team for a while, Glacias turned back to me.
1000652011.korean: - 한동안 말없이 북극 탐험대를 바라보던 글라시아스가 다시 내게 고개를 돌렸다.

1000652025.english: - A while ago, when I was talking with Peregrinus and Alfred, I heard that there was a problem with the body of the Glacias and they were asking if it could be fixed.
1000652025.korean: - 얼마 전 페레그리누스, 알프레드와 이야기를 나눌 때, 글라시아스의 동체에 문제가 생겼는데 고쳐줄 수 있냐는 이야기를 들었었다.

1000652031.english: - After calling for the Doctor and Azaz to ask them to look after Glacias, Peregrinus whispered in a soft voice.
1000652031.korean: - 닥터와 아자즈를 호출해 글라시아스를 부탁한 뒤, 페레그리누스가 은근한 목소리로 속삭였다.

1000652051.english: - Cardinal Armand silently embraced my waist.

1000652054.english: - Cardinal Armand, who had been holding me for a while, pulled away and smiled brightly.
1000652054.korean: - 한동안 날 끌어안고 있던 아르망은 몸을 떼곤 생긋 웃었다.

1000652060.english: Instead of answering my question, Cardinal Armand smiled and held out his hand.
1000652060.korean: - 아르망은 내 물음에 대답하는 대신, 빙긋 웃으며 손을 내밀었다.

1000652063.english: - Whether my protesting gaze didn't convey my feelings or not, Cardinal Armand's smile deepened further.
1000652063.korean: - 내 항변하는 눈빛이 전해지지 않은 건지, 아르망의 미소는 더욱 깊어졌다.

1000652070.english: - Cardinal Armand gently placed his hand on my head.
1000652070.korean: - 아르망이 부드럽게 내 머리에 손을 올렸다.

1000652076.english: - Cardinal Armand smiled faintly and left the captain's cabin.

1000652082.english: - Just as I was about to open the operation document, the user 'Cardinal Cardinal Armand' took permission.
1000652082.korean: - 작전 문서를 열람하려는 순간, ‘Cardinal Armand’라는 사용자가 권한을 가져갔다.

1000652478.english: You don't need to worry, as Miss Fotia of Fireside doesn't smell of anything.
1000652478.korean: 포티아 양에게선 아무런 냄새도 나지 않으니 걱정하지 않아도 괜찮사옵니다.

1000652544.english: Now that I'm staying here, I need a sanctuary where I can hole up, drink hot CoCo & WhiteShella, and play board games.
1000652544.korean: 이제 이곳에 머무르게 됐으니까, 콕 틀어박혀서 따뜻한 코코아를 마시고 보드게임을 할만한 안식처가 필요해.

1000652626.english: Sister... Salacia, I want to eat more...

1000652628.english: I'm sorry, I'm sorry. Salacia is a little young...

1000652635.english: Since Ms. Salacia happens to want more, I will bring it out right away.
1000652635.korean: 마침 시아 양이 더 먹고 싶다고 하니, 바로 내어오겠사옵니다.

1000652645.english: Oh, yeah. Salacia, you can eat as much as you want. Because the chef gave me permission.
1000652645.korean: 아, 응. 시아 먹고 싶은 만큼 더 먹어도 돼. 주방장님이 허락해 주셨으니까.

1000652662.english: Okay. I'll just buy one and give it to Salacia.

1000652728.english: At least not Salacia... I wanted to protect you...

1000652743.english: However, I heard that Mr. Muse and Mr. P-49 Sleipnir prepared such gifts...
1000652743.korean: 그렇지만 뮤즈 씨와 슬레이프니르 씨는 이런 선물을 준비했다고 들었습니다...

1000652828.english: First of all... I should talk to Oberonia Rhea first.

1000652872.english: - Cardinal Armand and Alpha are handling their tasks smoothly.
1000652872.korean: - 아르망과 알파는 물흐르듯이 업무를 처리해 나가고 있다.

1000652876.english: - Cardinal Armand and Alpha's voices were as gentle as usual, but their eyes and hands were constantly darting between the monitor and the documents.
1000652876.korean: - 아르망과 알파의 목소리는 평소처럼 온화했지만, 눈과 손을 쉴 새 없이 모니터와 서류를 오가고 있다.

1000652879.english: - Vanilla A1, who had been alternating between looking at Cardinal Armand and me sipping our coffee, grinned.
1000652879.korean: - 커피를 홀짝이는 나와 아르망, 알파의 모습을 번갈아 보던 바닐라가 씨익 웃었다.

1000652882.english: Didn't you hear from Cardinal Armand?

1000652885.english: - I quickly got up from my seat at Vanilla A1's fierce glare.
1000652885.korean: - 바닐라의 서슬퍼런 기세에 후다닥 자리에서 일어났다.

1000652888.english: - I took a moment to recall the memory of spending a day with Vanilla A1.
1000652888.korean: - 잠시 시간을 내어 바닐라와 한나절 동안 데이트를 했던 기억을 떠올렸다.

1000652890.english: - I smiled at Vanilla A1, who was looking away, and left the bridge.
1000652890.korean: - 딴청을 부리는 바닐라에게 웃어주고 함교에서 나왔다.

1000652900.english: - It's not that I don't trust Scissors Lise. Actually, I've asked several times before. But...
1000652900.korean: - 리제를 못 믿는 건 아니다. 실제로 예전에는 몇 번이고 부탁한 적이 있고. 하지만…

1000652908.english: - With Scissors Lise's words, silence fell over the infirmary.
1000652908.korean: - 리제의 말을 끝으로 의무실에는 고요가 내려앉았다.

1000652910.english: - After giving the injection and checking the chart and monitor, Scissors Lise let out a small sigh and then...
1000652910.korean: - 주사를 놓고 차트와 모니터를 확인한 리제는 작게 한숨을 내쉰 리제는…

1000652937.english: (Orca, Leona of Blood and Iron's Room)

1000652942.english: - Leona of Blood and Iron withdrew her hand from her holster and asked me, lying in bed, as if she couldn't believe it.
1000652942.korean: - 레오나는 홀스터에서 손을 거두고, 침대에 누워 있는 내게 어이없다는듯 물었다.

1000652948.english: - When I grinned, Leona of Blood and Ironrdo grinned back and climbed onto the bed, lying down beside me.
1000652948.korean: - 내가 씨익 웃자 레오나도 마주 웃으며 침대로 올라와 곁에 누웠다.

1000652950.english: Miss Cardinal Armand made a good decision.

1000652951.english: - At my words, Leona of Blood and Iron gave a small laugh.

1000652959.english: - As I spread my arms as wide as I could, Leona of Blood and Iron gave a small laugh and came closer, kissing my lips.
1000652959.korean: - 내가 양 팔을 있는 힘껏 벌리자 레오나는 작게 웃으며 다가와 내 입술에 입을 맞췄다.

1000652969.english: - Leona of Blood and Iron naturally wrapped her arms around my neck and murmured.
1000652969.korean: - 레오나는 자연스럽게 내 목에 팔을 감고 중얼거렸다.

1000652971.english: - Soothing Leona of Blood and Iron, I headed toward the small bathroom attached to the room.
1000652971.korean: - 레오나를 달래주며, 방에 딸린 작은 욕실로 향했다.

1000652982.english: That was definitely the first time I'd seen Vanilla A1 like that.
1000652982.korean: 확실히 바닐라의 그런 모습은 처음 봤었지.

1000653053.english: They told me to come back before it's too late. Make sure to take good care of LRL and T-13 Alvis.
1000653053.korean: 너무 늦지 않게 돌아오래. LRL이랑 알비스 잘 챙기고.

1000653085.english: Ugh...! So that's why I suggested exploring together with the T-8W Valkyrie sisters...!
1000653085.korean: 으으...! 그래서 발할라 자매들한테 같이 탐험하자고 권유했던 건데...!

1000653087.english: Originally, T-13 Alvis wasn't supposed to be able to explore either, but I barely got permission from Captain Leona of Blood and Iron!
1000653087.korean: 원래는 알비스도 탐험 못하는 건데, 레오나 대장님한테 겨우 허락 받았어!

1000653150.english: There's a spell to wake Glacias from his deep sleep...
1000653150.korean: 깊은 잠에 빠져든 글라시아스를 깨우는 주문이 있지...

1000653164.english: Princess, T-13 Alvis will protect you!

1000653182.english: T-13 Alvis team member! Shaking him any more could cause a concussion, so it's probably best to just leave him lying still.
1000653182.korean: 알비스 대원! 그 이상 흔들면 뇌진탕이 발생할 수 있으니, 그대로 눕혀두는 게 좋을 것 같아.

1000653240.english: Glacias, who came from another dimension, made a contract with the Dragon Slayer and vowed to exterminate the evil dragons.
1000653240.korean: 다른 차원에서 넘어온 글라시아스는 용살자와 계약을 맺고, 악룡의 멸절을 다짐했지.

1000653271.english: ... T-13 Alvis, you always sleep at this time, so you must be getting sleepy.
1000653271.korean: ...알비스, 늘 이 시간에 자서 슬슬 졸려.

1000653328.english: But did C-33 Andvari really give this much? He brought so much.
1000653328.korean: 그런데 안드바리가 이렇게나 많이 준 거야? 엄청 많이 가져왔던데.

1000653362.english: A Bioroid is engaging a lone Iron Bug (Iron Bug) on the front. If by any chance you are acquainted...
1000653362.korean: 전방에서 한 바이오로이드가 홀로 철충과 교전중이다. 혹시 면식이 있는 사이라면...

1000653461.english: It's work hours for me. Miss Cardinal Armand asked me to monitor the reconnaissance unit.
1000653461.korean: 저는 업무 시간이라서요. 아르망 양에게 정찰 부대 모니터링을 부탁받았어요.

1000653654.english: - Looking at their behavior, I was sure they were the type who completely immersed themselves in their work, just like Magical BaekTo before...
1000653654.korean: - 행동거지를 보고 분명 이전의 백토처럼 완전히 작품에 몰입한 타입이라고 생각했는데…

1000653680.english: - When I went to LRL earlier, I heard that the Arctic expedition team had a vacancy because T-13 Alvis was taken away.
1000653680.korean: - 아까 LRL을 찾아갔을 때, 북극 탐험대는 알비스가 끌려가는 바람에 결원이 생겼다고 들었다.

1000653710.english: I don't know. Ask Cardinal Armand about unit reorganization or combat missions.
1000653710.korean: 난 몰라. 부대 재편이나 전투 임무는 아르망한테 물어봐.

1000653772.english: Let's go on an adventure again with LRL and T-13 Alvis! I'm sure we'll find something amazing again!
1000653772.korean: 다시 LRL 대원과 알비스 대원이랑 모험하자! 분명 또 엄청난 걸 발견할 수 있을 거야!

1000653774.english: T-13 Alvis is the magical archer guarding the gate... So, C-33 Andvari dragged him away, and LRL was with the Cyclops Princess...
1000653774.korean: 알비스는 관문을 지키는 마탄의 사수... 그러니까 안드바리한테 끌려갔고, LRL은 사이클롭스 프린세스랑...

1000653918.english: T-13 Alvis should have come too...

1000654112.english: MH-4 Thetis, is it? What are you doing?

1000654113.english: Oh, Captain Royal Arsenal! Hehe, we're opening a cafe this time. But just by chance, there was this really nice cafe right here.
1000654113.korean: 아, 아스널 대장님! 헤헹, 저희 이번에 카페를 열기로 했거든요. 그런데 마침~ 여기에 이렇게 번듯한 카페가 있는 거예요.

1000654140.english: Captain Royal Arsenal. I don't understand what you're saying, but I'll be going to see my master now.
1000654140.korean: 아스널 대장님. 무슨 말씀이신지 모르겠지만, 저는 이만 주인님께 가보겠습니다.

1000654145.english: ... But did the Captain Royal Arsenal hear something?

1000654178.english: - My current 'life' began in a pit somewhere, when I met the P/A-00 Griffon and Constancia.
1000654178.korean: - 지금의 내 ‘삶’은… 어딘가의 구덩이에서, 그리폰과 콘스탄챠를 만나며 시작되었다는 것.

1000654203.english: What do I do...? Why did you do that, P-3M Undine? You idiot...

1000654207.english: City, Salacia, I was so surprised... What's wrong?
1000654207.korean: 시, 시아 깜짝 놀랐어... 왜 그래?

1000654227.english: Salacia, did that help? That's a relief.

1000654228.english: But this... Who are you eating with? Salacia, can I eat it?
1000654228.korean: 그런데 이거... 누구랑 먹어? 시아, 먹어도 돼?

1000654233.english: Wow, it's delicious...! Salacia, I've never eaten anything this delicious before!
1000654233.korean: 와아, 맛있어...! 시아, 이렇게 맛있는 거 처음 먹어봐!

1000654236.english: Of course~! I am P-3M Undine, the genius pastry chef in charge of the kitchen at Cafe Horizon!
1000654236.korean: 당연하지~! 내가 바로 카페 호라이즌의 주방을 책임지는, 천재 파티시에르 운디네니까!

1000654249.english: Ahahaha! Go away, it's itchy! ~ Salacia, my stomach hurts~
1000654249.korean: 아하하하하! 가, 간지러워!~ 시아, 배 아파~

1000654252.english: City, Salacia... I was just passing by... Aaaah!

1000654259.english: Wow, it's delicious! Salacia, I've never eaten anything like this before. What's going on?
1000654259.korean: 마, 맛있어~ 시아, 이런 건 처음 먹어봐. 뭐야뭐야?

1000654267.english: Huh? Isn't Pani Pani shorter than Salacia?
1000654267.korean: 어? 파니파니가 시아보다 키 작지 않아?

1000654269.english: Wow... Yes! Salacia, I'm going to beat Salacia!

1000654271.english: Why is it so noisy? Has X-05 Emily returned?

1000654286.english: When you take care of X-05 Emily, you feel like a guardian, right?
1000654286.korean: 에밀리 돌볼 때도 보호자 같은 느낌이지?

1000654291.english: It's because X-05 Emily is copying the behavior of her two older sisters. Last time, I...
1000654291.korean: 에밀리가 언니인 둘의 행동을 따라하니까 그렇다고, 저번에 제가...

1000654299.english: Oh, Salacia. This is just a joke between us, so you don't need to worry about it.
1000654299.korean: 아, 시아. 이거 우리끼리 장난치는 거니까 걱정 안해도 돼~

1000654304.english: I suddenly thought of X-05 Emily too. They said they were going out to play with their friends earlier, I wonder where they are now...
1000654304.korean: 나도 갑자기 에밀리 생각 나네. 아까 친구들이랑 놀러 나간다더니, 지금 어디있으려나...

1000654305.english: Ahaha. Salacia, you've got something on your mouth again already.
1000654305.korean: 아하하. 시아, 그새 입에 또 뭐 묻혔다.

1000654313.english: Salacia, she loves playing the most. Let's play together!
1000654313.korean: 시아, 노는 거 제일 좋아. 같이 놀래!

1000654331.english: Yeah. Salacia, hide behind the tree. You mustn't get caught.
1000654331.korean: 응. 시아, 나무 뒤에 숨어있어. 들키면 안 돼.

1000654345.english: There's nothing proper to drink, but maybe the CoCo & WhiteShella from the combat rations...
1000654345.korean: 제대로 된 마실 건 없지만, 전투식량의 코코아라도...

1000654346.english: Oh! Salacia, I've seen this before. I don't know... Are you going to ride it? I ate it on the island!
1000654346.korean: 아! 시아, 이거 본 적 있어. 몰... 타? 섬에서 먹었었어!

1000654357.english: Salacia, you said you were going to play by yourself!

1000654379.english: Salacia, I'm already looking forward to it~

1000654387.english: Sister, were you playing with Captain Jeon? Salacia wants to play too~
1000654387.korean: 언니, 전단장님이랑 놀고 있었구나? 시아도 같이 놀래~

1000654389.english: Here, Salacia. Want to come see Sister for a bit?

1000654391.english: Sister knitted it for Salacia and Captain Jeon.

1000654396.english: Yeah, Fanny Fanny, AO-2 Raven, and AT-100 Beast Hunter.

1000654400.english: What I ate today~! Salacia, I was hungry so I ate a little bit, but I asked them to pack some for you and the team leader.
1000654400.korean: 오늘 먹은 거~! 시아, 배고파서 조금씩 먹기는 했는데 언니랑 전단장님하고 먹으려고 싸달라고 했어.

1000654401.english: - What's in the lunchbox is a cheese dish and... This must be an P-3M Undine.
1000654401.korean: - 도시락통 안에 담긴 것은 치즈요리랑... 이건 운디네겠군.

1000654404.english: Let's eat quickly, okay? Salacia, I'm hungry!

1000654406.english: - It's not just the members' hearts in preparing for Salacia, but I never expected them to bring it to eat together...
1000654406.korean: - 시아를 위해 챙겨준 대원들의 마음도 마음이지만, 그걸 같이 먹으려고 싸올줄은...

1000654408.english: Huh? Hmm... Actually, Salacia was fine because she ate a lot, little by little.
1000654408.korean: 응? 으음... 사실, 시아 조금씩 많이 먹어서 괜찮았어.

1000654417.english: Hmm... Do it for Salacia too. Huh?

1000654439.english: CoCo & WhiteShell is the only one who really understands me!
1000654439.korean: 역시 내 맘 알아주는 건 코코밖에 없데이!

1000654442.english: Haha! It's impossible not to speak in dialect, even in front of CoCo & WhiteShell.
1000654442.korean: 하핫! 코코 앞에서도 사투리 안 쓰긴 글렀다.

1000654443.english: MH-4 Thetis, it definitely seems like bunny girls are popular these days. All the kids are wearing them and walking around.
1000654443.korean: 테티스, 확실히 요즘 바니걸이 유행인가봐. 애들 다 입고 돌아다니잖아.

1000654446.english: The outfit MH-4 Thetis prepared is exactly what will completely captivate the perverted commander's attention!
1000654446.korean: 테티스가 준비한 의상이야말로, 변태 사령관님의 시선을 확 사로잡을 거라구~

1000654465.english: Shall we rest here today? It's okay if CoCo & WhiteShell and I go alone for a day or so. To the boss, I'm...
1000654465.korean: 오늘은 여기서 쉴래? 하루 정도는 코코랑 나만 가도 괜찮아. 대장한테는 내가...

1000654468.english: That's right! You'll observe, and CoCo & WhiteShell and I will break the ice to retrieve the supplies inside.
1000654468.korean: 그렇지! 너가 관측하고 나랑 코코가 얼음을 깨부숴서 그 안의 물자를 가져올 거야.

1000654479.english: Hussar, belonging to the Orbital Watchers. And Spartoia, CoCo & WhiteShell, and I just returned from completing our glacier exploration.
1000654479.korean: 오비탈 와쳐 소속, 후사르. 그리고 스파토이아, 코코 셋이서 빙하 탐사를 마치고 지금 막 복귀했습니다.

1000654481.english: - I told him what happened with Cardinal Armand, and the Hussar nodded.
1000654481.korean: - 아르망과 있었던 일을 이야기했더니 후사르가 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000654483.english: - I tried using the joke I shared with Vanilla A1 again, but Hussar got serious.
1000654483.korean: - 바닐라와 나눴던 농담을 다시 써먹어봤는데 후사르가 정색했다.

1000654532.english: CoCo & WhiteShell! Where did you find that bunny girl outfit?

1000654545.english: We're all part of the Orbital Watch! Right, CoCo & WhiteShell?
1000654545.korean: 우린 오비탈 와쳐 소속 동료잖아! 안 그래, 코코?

1000654550.english: I got mine from C-33 Andvari.

1000654555.english: Huh? Didn't CoCo & WhiteShell say there weren't any left there?
1000654555.korean: 응? 거기 코코가 없다고 하지 않았나?

1000654578.english: CoCo & WhiteShell and I just got a support request.

1000654733.english: - Right in front of me now, there's Scissors Lise.

1000654735.english: - Scissors Lise, struggling while tightly bound.

1000654782.english: - Scissors Lise's body, cradled in his arms, went limp.
1000654782.korean: - 품에 안긴 리제의 몸이 축 늘어졌다

1000654785.english: - I waited outside the infirmary for a moment, and then Oberonia Rhea sighed and came out into the hallway.
1000654785.korean: - 의무실 밖에서 잠시 기다리고 있자, 레아가 한숨을 쉬며 복도로 나왔다.

1000654788.english: It's okay. Scissors Lise will wake up soon.

1000654789.english: - The Fairy series models are all derived from Oberonia Rhea. The meaning of this is that they are actually closer to being sisters or mother and daughter.
1000654789.korean: - 페어리 시리즈는 전부 레아에게서 파생된 모델이다. 이 말의 의미는 이들이 실제 자매, 혹은 모녀 관계에 가깝다는 것.

1000654790.english: - Lise, Daphne, and the Dryad all share some of Oberonia Rhea's personality traits... and Aqua is no exception.
1000654790.korean: - 리제, 다프네, 드리아드 모두 레아의 성격적 특성을 조금씩 갖고 있고… 그건 아쿠아도 예외는 아니다.

1000654791.english: ...I'm listening carefully to Ms. Alexandra of Resonance.

1000654800.english: - Oberonia Rhea, who had calmed Aqua, let out a small sigh.
1000654800.korean: - 아쿠아를 달랜 레아가 작게 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000654812.english: - Scissors Lise's problem stems from being overly conscious of physical contact with me. Then what if we cover it up with a different action?
1000654812.korean: - 리제의 문제는 나와 스킨십을 한다는 것을 지나치게 의식해서 발생하는 것. 그렇다면 다른 행동으로 덮어씌운다면 어떨까?

1000654813.english: - First, I'm holding a strawberry, which has been on the table a lot lately, halfway in my mouth, and Scissors Lise is eating that strawberry.
1000654813.korean: - 일단 내가 요즘 유난히 식탁에 자주 오르는 딸기를 입에 반쯤 물고 있고, 리제는 그 딸기를 먹는다.

1000654815.english: - ...Scissors Lise's enthusiasm was so great that I reluctantly agreed, but honestly, I didn't think there was much of a chance.
1000654815.korean: - …리제의 열의가 대단해서 어쩔 수 없이 승낙하긴 했지만, 솔직히 큰 가능성은 없다고 생각했다.

1000654819.english: - Because Scissors Lise is showing us her old, missed self after a very long time...
1000654819.korean: - 리제가 아주 오랜만에… 그리운 예전 모습을 보여주고 있으니까.

1000654821.english: - Scissors Lise slowly approached me. Surprisingly, it seems the suggestion worked, and they don't appear particularly embarrassed.
1000654821.korean: - 리제가 조금씩 내게 다가왔다. 놀랍게도 암시가 효과가 있는지, 딱히 부끄러워하는 기색은 보이지 않는다.

1000654829.english: - I treated my injured tongue and brought Scissors Lise to the captain's cabin.
1000654829.korean: - 다친 혀를 치료하고, 리제를 함장실로 데려왔다.

1000654830.english: - With weak footsteps, Scissors Lise followed me in and huddled in the corner of the room.
1000654830.korean: - 힘없는 발걸음으로 나를 따라 들어온 리제는 방 구석에 웅크리고 앉았다.

1000654832.english: - I called out to Scissors Lise again, who turned her back when I approached.
1000654832.korean: - 내가 다가가자 등을 돌려버리는 리제를 재차 불렀다.

1000654834.english: - I sat crouched down, a distance away that would allow one person to sit between me and Scissors Lise.
1000654834.korean: - 웅크린 리제와 사람 한 명이 앉을 수 있을 만한 거리를 두고 앉았다.

1000654841.english: - Even Scissors Lise, who finds it difficult to kiss on the forehead or back of the hand instead of the lips...
1000654841.korean: - 입술이 아닌 이마나 손등에 키스를 하는 것도 어려운 리제니까…

1000654843.english: - Scissors Lise stared silently at the pinky finger I held out.
1000654843.korean: - 리제는 내가 내민 새끼손가락을 가만히 바라보았다.

1000654845.english: - A moment later, Scissors Lise's slightly trembling pinky finger touched mine, forming a hook.
1000654845.korean: - 잠시 후 살짝 떨리는 리제의 새끼 손가락이 내 손가락에 닿고, 고리를 만들었다.

1000654847.english: - Scissors Lise stared at their touching fingertips for a while, as if trying to remember the sensation.
1000654847.korean: - 리제는 맞닿은 손가락의 감촉을 기억하려는 듯, 한동안 가만히 그것을 바라보고 있었다.

1000654848.english: Hang in there, Scissors Lise-chan! END.

1000654915.english: - Sticking out her tongue and smiling, Cheona strode toward me.
1000654915.korean: - 혀를 내밀고 웃어보인 천아는 성큼성큼 내 앞으로 다가왔다.

1000654918.english: - After examining me from head to toe for a while, Cheona giggled.
1000654918.korean: - 한동안 나를 구석구석 살펴보던 천아가 배시시 웃었다.

1000654923.english: - To ensure my will was clearly conveyed, I looked into Cheona's eyes and spoke with emphasis.
1000654923.korean: - 의지가 똑똑히 전해지도록, 천아의 눈을 바라보며 힘주어 말했다.

1000654928.english: - The face of Cheona, nestled in my arms and rubbing her cheek against me, looked so happy.
1000654928.korean: - 내 품에 안겨서 볼을 비비는 천아의 얼굴은 너무나도 행복해 보였다.

1000654932.english: - Cheona was happily enjoying my body heat for a while.
1000654932.korean: - 천아는 한동안 행복하게 내 체온을 만끽하고 있었다.

1000654937.english: - In Cheona's hand was another identification card that he had kept in his pocket.
1000654937.korean: - 천아의 손에는 안주머니에 넣어뒀던 또다른 인식증이 들려 있었다.

1000654939.english: - The serious atmosphere that had suddenly fallen over Cheona returned to a grin as she placed the identification card in my pocket.
1000654939.korean: - 순간 진지한 분위기가 되었던 천아는 다시 씨익 웃으며 내 안주머니에 인식증을 넣어 주었다.

1000654942.english: - Seeing Cheona smiling brightly and holding her hands together in front of her face, I resisted the urge to facepalm.
1000654942.korean: - 활짝 웃으며 얼굴 앞에 양 손을 모아 내미는 천아를 보며 이마를 짚고 싶은 것을 참았다.

1000654946.english: Seeing Poi grumble and then return behind him, Cheona feigned surprise.
1000654946.korean: - 볼멘소리를 하고 다시 내 뒤로 돌아가는 포이를 보며 천아는 짐짓 놀란 표정을 지었다.

1000654950.english: - Cheona said casually and burrowed back into my arms.
1000654950.korean: - 천아는 대수롭지 않게 말하며 다시 내 품속으로 파고들었다.

1000654953.english: - With her body still, Cheona clasped her hands neatly at her navel and bowed her head.
1000654953.korean: - 몸을 뗀 천아는 손을 가지런히 배꼽에 모으고 꾸벅 고개를 숙였다.

1000654954.english: I am Cheona, from the Empress Hound. JangHwa and I are... well, we're at the point where it wouldn't be awkward if we just ate a meal together, just the two of us.
1000654954.korean: 엠프레시스 하운드 소속, 천아입니다. 장화랑은… 음, 그냥 대충 단 둘이 밥 먹어도 어색하진 않은 정도 사이구요.

1000654961.english: - Cheona was a target for intensive monitoring from the moment he boarded the transport ship with JangHwa.
1000654961.korean: - 천아는 장화와 함께 수송선을 타고 올 때부터 집중 모니터링 대상이었다.

1000654965.english: - Just like a moment ago, Cheona's voice became serious.

1000654966.english: - It might just be my imagination, but I felt sadness in Cheona's eyes as he gazed blankly at the dementia.
1000654966.korean: - 내 착각일지도 모르지만, 인식증을 물끄러미 내려다보는 천아의 눈동자에서 슬픔이 느껴졌다.

1000654968.english: - Cheona smiled brightly, as if to brush it off, and hugged me again.
1000654968.korean: - 천아는 얼버무리듯이 환하게 웃으며 다시 내 품에 안겼다.

1000654974.english: - Not long after Poi and Cheona, who were bickering, returned to the Orca with the others, a red-haired android knocked on the captain's cabin door.
1000654974.korean: - 티격태격하는 포이, 천아와 함께 오르카 호로 돌아온지 얼마 지나지 않아서, 붉은 머리카락의 바이오로이드가 함장실 문을 두드렸다.
