1000655006.english: - Then Cerestia of Life is the most suitable for being the most versatile. Every aspect of her appearance, behavior, and personality is truly the embodiment of motherhood.
1000655006.korean: - 그렇다면 세레스티아야말로 가장 만능에 걸맞다고 할 수 있다. 외모, 행동, 성격 하나하나 그야말로 모성의 화신.

1000655011.english: - If Cerestia of Life is an all-rounder, Sekhmet of Death can be said to have S-rank in all stats except for one.
1000655011.korean: - 세레스티아가 올라운더라면, 세크메트는 한 가지의 능력치를 제외하면 모두 S급이라고 할 수 있다.

1000655013.english: - Sekhmet of Death is still clumsy. Because they are clumsy, their heart leads them, which quickly manifests as a radical and rigid attitude.
1000655013.korean: - 세크메트는 아직 서투르다. 서투르기 때문에 마음이 앞서게 되고, 이는 곧 과격하고 강경한 태도로 나타난다.

1000655014.english: - If I'm caught, I'll surely end up living a life where I entrust everything to Sekhmet of Death.
1000655014.korean: - 붙잡힌다면, 분명 나는 모든 것을 세크메트에게 맡기는 삶을 살게 될 터.

1000655015.english: - Indomitable Marie, the master strategist, and Frigga, who specializes in one-on-one combat, complement each other's weaknesses, pushing me into a corner.
1000655015.korean: - 전략의 달인인 마리와 대인전에 특화된 프리가가 서로의 빈틈을 보완하며 나를 궁지로 몰아넣는다.

1000655028.english: - After confirming that I had lost the will to resist, Cerestia of Life approached me with gentle steps and embraced me.
1000655028.korean: - 내가 저항 의지를 상실한 것을 확인하고 나긋나긋한 걸음으로 다가온 세레스티아가 나를 품에 안았다.

1000655050.english: - The opening Maria, unfamiliar with tactical movements, momentarily showed. In the split second after 0.5 seconds, when Indomitable Marie will block, I boldly exploit that opening!
1000655050.korean: - 전술적인 움직임에 익숙하지 않은 마리아가 일순간 보인 빈틈. 0.5초 후면 마리가 막아설 그 찰나의 빈틈을, 과감하게 파고든다!

1000655069.english: - Only after wiping the sweat with the towel C-33 Andvari had brought and drinking an entire bottle of mineral water was I finally able to regain a little bit of peace of mind and body.
1000655069.korean: - 안드바리가 가져온 수건으로 땀을 닦고, 생수 한 병을 전부 마시고 나서야 간신히 심신의 안정을 조금이나마 되찾을 수 있었다.

1000655071.english: I thought it was obviously LRL and T-13 Alvis when someone suddenly ran in.
1000655071.korean: 저는 누가 갑자기 뛰어들어오길래, 당연히 LRL이랑 알비스인줄 알았거든요.

1000655077.english: - Shaking off a slight hesitation, I lay down with C-33 Andvari's knee as a pillow.
1000655077.korean: - 약간의 망설임을 털어버리고, 안드바리의 무릎을 베고 누웠다.

1000655081.english: - Although C-33 Andvari himself didn't realize it, I, who had run away from motherhood, met another mother...
1000655081.korean: - 정작 안드바리는 깨닫지 못했지만, 모성에게서 도망친 나는 또다른 모성을 만났고…

1000655099.english: - Connector Yumi, who was looking at me pitifully as I screamed, glanced at my battle record.
1000655099.korean: - 괴성을 지르는 나를 안쓰럽게 바라보던 유미가 내 대전 기록을 훑어보았다.

1000655103.english: - As I was looking thru the Daejeon records with a heavy heart, Connector Yumi massaged my shoulders.
1000655103.korean: - 착잡한 마음으로 대전 기록을 훑어보는 내 어깨를 유미가 주물러 주었다.

1000655111.english: - The enemy's camp. With all the defense towers destroyed, a large team fight broke out during the standoff. Connector Yumi, who was small in stature, was sitting between my legs for the coach.
1000655111.korean: - 적의 진영. 방어 타워는 모두 철거된 상태에서 대치중 커다란 한타가 벌어졌다. 체구가 작은 유미는 코치를 위해 내 다리 사이에 앉아 있었다.

1000655117.english: - 1 win after a 24-game losing streak. I hugged Connector Yumi and reveled in the overwhelming emotion.
1000655117.korean: - 24연패 후 1승. 유미를 끌어안고 북받치는 감동을 만끽했다.

1000655128.english: - Follow Connector Yumi to the room and wash with a new ID - I created a new ID.
1000655128.korean: - 유미를 따라 방으로 가서 새 아이디로 세탁- 새 아이디를 만들었다.

1000655130.english: - Excited by the hard-won victory, he made a joke, but instead of being embarrassed, Connector Yumi pouted.
1000655130.korean: - 간신히 따낸 승리에 고양되어 던진 농담에, 유미는 부끄러워하는 것이 아니라 입술을 삐죽였다.

1000655173.english: Don't talk like Sergeant M-5 Efreeti! Ugh...!
1000655173.korean: 이프리트 병장님 같은 말씀하시지 말구요! 끄응...!

1000655201.english: This… are we really sure Scissors Lise agreed to this…?
1000655201.korean: 이거… 진짜 리제가 동의한 거 맞지…?

1000655202.english: Well… there's no way Aqua could tie Scissors Lise up alone…
1000655202.korean: 하긴… 아쿠아 혼자 리제를 묶을 수 있을리가…

1000655234.english: Cheona, maybe…? No, actually, this works out. I'll go meet them.
1000655234.korean: 천아인가… 아니, 차라리 잘 됐어. 만나볼게.

1000655275.english: Sorry, C-33 Andvari… can you not ask?

1000655335.english: No. X-05 Emily alone might be in danger.
1000655335.korean: 안 돼. 에밀리 혼자면 위험할 수도 있어.

1000655342.english: X-05 Emily has to handle things so I can finish it cleanly.
1000655342.korean: 에밀리가 처리해야 내가 곱게 갈아버릴 수 있어.

1000655343.english: I can't do it alone. It's only possible because X-05 Emily is there.
1000655343.korean: 나 혼자서는 못해. 에밀리가 있어서 가능한 일이야.

1000655357.english: X-05 Emily and Zenox? Are you ready?

1000655369.english: - X-05 Emily will clear the snow, Neodym will remove the stones from the ground, and then they will spread out the mats.
1000655369.korean: - 에밀리가 눈밭을 치우고, 네오딤이 바닥에 돌을 제거한 뒤 돗자리를 펼 것이고.

1000655597.english: The cause, the scent of the T-9 Gremlin's perfume is too strong.
1000655597.korean: 원인, 그렘린의 향수 냄새가 너무 진함.

1000655605.english: Mr. Magical BaekTo, Ms. Magical MoMo. Look over there! They're planning to set up an outdoor stage!
1000655605.korean: 백토 씨, 모모 씨. 저기 좀 보세요! 야외 무대 설치 예정이래요!

1000655680.english: Scissors Lise, just go at the pace that's right for you.
1000655680.korean: 리제는 리제한테 맞는 속도로 하면 돼.

1000655691.english: - Titania was born at the same time as Oberonia Rhea, but in different laboratories.
1000655691.korean: - 티타니아는 레아와 동시에, 서로 다른 연구소에서 태어났다.

1000655693.english: - However, the researchers didn't want to discard the results of their time and budget investment, so they instilled jealousy and hatred in Titania toward Oberonia Rhea.
1000655693.korean: - 하지만 연구자들은 시간과 예산을 투입한 결과물을 폐기하는 것을 원하지 않았고, 티타니아에게 레아에 대한 시기와 증오를 심었다.

1000655703.english: - When it was first restored, Titania went berserk the moment she saw Oberonia Rhea.
1000655703.korean: - 처음 복원 되었을 때, 티타니아는 레아를 보자마자 폭주했다.

1000655709.english: - And now... I also know very well why the fairies, especially Oberonia Rhea, vehemently opposed Titania's restoration.
1000655709.korean: - 그리고 이제는... 페어리, 그중에서도 특히 레아가 티타니아의 복원을 극렬하게 반대했던 이유도 잘 알고 있다.

1000655732.english: - Daphne, Scissors Lise, Dryad... And seeing the regret in Titania's gaze as she looked at Aqua in my arms, I couldn't help but feel relieved.
1000655732.korean: - 다프네, 리제, 드리아드... 그리고 내 품에 안겨 있는 아쿠아를 보는 티타니아의 시선에 후회가 감도는 것을 보고 내심 안도할 수 있었다.

1000655766.english: - A basket containing the sedatives Daphne and Scissors Lise had given me, the apple the Dryad had carved, and the blanket Aqua had brought, lay overturned in the snow.
1000655766.korean: - 다프네와 리제에게 받아온 안정제와, 드리아드가 깎은 사과, 그리고 아쿠아가 담은 담요가 들어있는 바구니가 눈밭에 나동그라졌다.

1000655769.english: - I sat back down, took out the novel P-22 Harpyia had recommended, and opened it.
1000655769.korean: - 다시 자리를 잡고 앉아서, 하르페이아에게 추천받은 소설책을 꺼내 펼쳤다.

1000655787.english: - Because if it's Oberonia Rhea, she definitely would.

1000655805.english: - Scissors Lise and Daphne, sleeping shoulder to shoulder.
1000655805.korean: - 서로 어깨를 맞대고 잠들어 있는 리제와 다프네.

1000655823.english: - I slowly sat up. That wind woke Oberonia Rhea up, but she's just quietly looking at me.
1000655823.korean: - 천천히 몸을 일으켰다. 그 바람에 레아가 깨어났지만, 조용히 나를 바라보고만 있다.

1000655824.english: - Similarly, I passed the dryads, Aqua, Scissors Lise, and Daphne, who had woken up and were watching me, and stood before him, who was still asleep.
1000655824.korean: - 마찬가지로 잠에서 깨어나 나를 지켜보는 드리아드, 아쿠아, 리제, 다프네를 지나쳐, 아직도 잠들어 있는 그의 앞에 섰다.

1000655847.english: ...You mean Titania probably used to be as kind as Oberonia Rhea too.

1000655888.english: P-3M Undine, MH-4 Thetis, what's wrong?

1000655911.english: We saved some for you too, AG-1 Nereid. Here, here.

1000655936.english: Think carefully. If we can successfully trap the Commander in our shop with MH-4 Thetis's special menu...
1000655936.korean: 잘 생각해 보세요. 이 테티스의 특제 스페셜 메뉴로... 사령관님을 저희 가게에 붙잡아 두는 데에 성공한다면!

1000655957.english: Shouldn't you, Captain Royal Arsenal, be the one giving up!
1000655957.korean: 포기는 아스널 대장님이 하셔야 하지 않습니까!

1000655982.english: Chief of Security Black Lilith. I'd like to open a live café with your precious little sister. What do you think?
1000655982.korean: 리리스 경호 대장. 귀하의 소중한 동생과 함께 라이브 카페를 좀 열고 싶은데, 어떻게 생각하나?

1000655986.english: Please take good care of CS Perrault. She's still really shy.
1000655986.korean: 페로를 잘 부탁드려요. 아직도 수줍음을 많이 타거든요.

1000655991.english: Ferro. Then listen carefully to the Captain Royal Arsenal, and since dinner is in the garden, come on time.
1000655991.korean: 페로. 그럼 아스널 대장님 말씀 잘 듣고, 저녁은 정원에서 먹을 거니까 시간 맞춰서 오렴.

1000656055.english: AG-1 Nereid! Can you help out on the floor for a bit?

1000656061.english: P-3M Undine, hurry up! The orders are piling up!

1000656063.english: I brought AG-1 Nereid. I'll help out in the kitchen.
1000656063.korean: 네레이드 데리고 왔어요. 제가 주방일을 도울게요.

1000656088.english: Hehe, I was just having a quick drink with some friends. Miss Machina, here you go.
1000656088.korean: 후후, 잠깐 친구들이랑 한 잔 하고 있었어요. 마키나 양, 여기요.

1000656174.english: X-05 Emily, time to wake up. We need to head back now.

1000656194.english: Then I'll take X-05 Emily back now. I need to get ready for the performance.
1000656194.korean: 그럼 에밀리를 데리고 돌아가도록. 나는 공연 준비를 해야하니.

1000656210.english: This isn't the song I chose! Captain Royal Arsenal, what's going on?!
1000656210.korean: 제가 고른 노래는 이게 아니잖아요! 아스널 대장님, 어떻게 된거죠?!

1000656259.english: Miss T-20S Gnome, let me just place an order... Huh?
1000656259.korean: 노움 양, 잠깐 주문 좀... 어라?

1000656260.english: I don't see the T-20S Gnome...?

1000656273.english: Two high-heeled footprints... If one belongs to Miss T-20S Gnome, then what about the other...?
1000656273.korean: 하이힐 발자국이 두 개... 하나가 노움 양의 거라면, 나머지는...?

1000656278.english: Ask me anything! Incompetent T-2 Brownie here knows everything!
1000656278.korean: 뭐든지 물어보십쇼! 불초 브라우니, 모르는 게 없지 말임다!

1000656279.english: T-20S Gnome... Sergeant didn't come to the café today. Did anything unusual happen?
1000656279.korean: 노움... 병장님이 오늘 카페에 출근을 안하셔서요. 혹시 별다른 이야기 없으셨나요?

1000656306.english: MH-4 Thetis, please take the order for the table by the window.

1000656308.english: - MH-4 Thetis snatched the menu from the table and held out what she had brought.
1000656308.korean: - 테티스는 테이블 위에 놓여있던 메뉴판을 휙 빼내더니, 들고온 것을 내밀었다.

1000656320.english: You wouldn't want to miss this chance, Master, whether it's one hour or two, with MH-4 Thetis—
1000656320.korean: 이런 기회를 놓칠 수는 없겠죠, 주인님? 한 시간이고 두 시간이고 테티스에게-

1000656321.english: Ah, no, MH-4 Thetis will be giving you kisses~
1000656321.korean: 아, 아니 테티스'가' 키스를 해드릴 거라구요~

1000656324.english: — As fingers brushed the cup, AG-1 Nereid jumped in surprise.
1000656324.korean: - 음료가 든 컵을 받아들다 손가락이 스치자, 네레이드가 펄쩍 뛰었다.

1000656327.english: — As a wrist was grabbed, MH-4 Thetis's face instantly flushed bright red.
1000656327.korean: - 가는 손목을 붙잡자, 테티스의 얼굴이 순식간에 새빨갛게 물들었다.

1000656337.english: — I gave a wry smile seeing MH-4 Thetis, P-3M Undine, and AG-1 Nereid standing side by side, blushing and twisting their bodies nervously.
1000656337.korean: - 나란히 서서 얼굴을 붉히고 몸을 배배 꼬고 있는 테티스, 운디네, 네레이드를 보고 쓴웃음을 지었다.

1000656421.english: - Blinked and exchanged glances with Royal Arsenal, Azaz, and Ferro.
1000656421.korean: - 눈을 껌뻑이며 아스널, 아자즈, 페로와 시선을 교환했다.

1000656445.english: - NiBA was easily defeated by Ferro.

1000656478.english: On the Orca, after me, the closest bunny is you, T-20S Gnome…
1000656478.korean: 지금 오르카 호에... 나 다음으로 토끼에 가장 가까운 게 노움, 너뿐이니까...

1000656501.english: "Burning Bunny's Soul"...? Could it be that strange energy Sergeant M-5 Efreeti sensed...!?
1000656501.korean: "타오르는 바니의 혼"...? 설마 이프리트 병장님께서 느꼈다는 기묘한 기운이...!

1000656530.english: - Titania poured the drink and then closed her eyes, as if uninterested. Leaning toward Oberonia Rhea, who was looking around with a bewildered expression, I whispered.
1000656530.korean: - 티타니아는 술을 따라주곤 관심없다는 듯 눈을 감아버렸다. 난감한 표정으로 눈치를 보고 있는 레아에게 몸을 기울여 속삭였다.

1000656533.english: - After the atmosphere relaxed as the three of us, including Oberonia Rhea, chatted about various things, I jokingly suggested that we try wearing the bunny girl costumes that are popular these days...
1000656533.korean: - 레아와 함께 셋이서 이런저런 이야기를 나누며 분위기가 풀어진 뒤, 농담삼아 요새 유행중인 바니걸 의상이라도 입어보는게 어떻겠냐고 말을 하긴 했었는데…

1000656543.english: - Beside me, Oberonia Rhea, equally flustered, was desperately racking her brains.
1000656543.korean: - 옆에서는 나만큼이나 당황한 레아가 필사적으로 머리를 굴리고 있었다.

1000656596.english: Hehe, it's all thanks to you, B-11 Night Angel.

1000656601.english: If you're going to wear a bunny girl outfit, maybe you should visit the Goddess Café with Commander Royal Arsenal.
1000656601.korean: 바니걸 의상을 입으면 아스널 대장님이 여신 카페에 가보는 것도 좋겠습니다.

1000656604.english: B-11 Night Angel, will you… ah, that is…

1000656616.english: Ah, B-11 Night Angel, would you take a look? I want to know how it looks to someone else—
1000656616.korean: 아, 나이트 앤젤이 한 번 봐줄래요? 다른 사람 눈에는 어떤지-

1000656664.english: Ah, P-3M Undine. Kitchen work is hard, right? Thanks, I'll enjoy this.
1000656664.korean: 아, 운디네. 주방일 힘들지? 이거 잘 마실게.

1000656758.english: P.S. Alfred, please meet Vanilla A1 in the maintenance room.
1000656758.korean: P.S. 알프레드 님은 정비실에서 바닐라 양을 만나도록 하세요.

1000656777.english: Okay, Constantia S2. Please assist the master from the side.

1000656798.english: You sure you didn't cheat? Huh~? A-15 Salamander!
1000656798.korean: 속임수 없이 한 거 맞아? 아앙~? 샐러맨더!

1000656809.english: They said they were taking a break, and now they're already playing cards.&nBut wow, it's been ages since I've seen A-15 Salamander lose.&nIs this the first time since the Commander?
1000656809.korean: 쟤들은 쉰다고 하자마자 바로 카드 치고 있네. 근데 샐러맨더가 지는 거 진짜 간만에 봐. 사령관 이후로 처음인가?

1000656827.english: ...Miss Lancer Mina asked me to do it.

1000656836.english: Hey, T-75 War Wolf! Why are you showing that of all things?!
1000656836.korean: 야, 워울프! 왜 하필 그걸 보여주고 있는 거야!

1000656842.english: The detected Iron Bugs are being taken out by sniper fire.
1000656842.korean: 색적된 철충들이 저격으로 처리되고 있다고 한다.

1000656846.english: Hello, Deputy Commander. And I look forward to working with you, Commander Khan the Swift.
1000656846.korean: 안녕, 부사령관님. 그리고 잘 부탁해, 칸 대장.

1000656859.english: No, Captain Khan the Swift is next in command if I'm not there, so I'll tell you in advance.
1000656859.korean: 아뇨, 제가 없으면 칸 대장님이 다음 지휘권자시니까 미리 말씀드릴게요.

1000656866.english: Hey~ Lancer Mina, X-00 Tiamat. I've been looking for you two.
1000656866.korean: 뭐야~ 미나, 티아멧. 어디 갔는지 찾고 있었잖아.

1000656877.english: Whew... A super long-range sniper rifle, huh. I thought the T-8W Valkyrie's gear was impressive, but this... this is something else.
1000656877.korean: 후우... 초장거리 저격총이라니. 발키리 것도 신기했는데 이건 또 엄청나구만...

1000656902.english: My name is X-02 Ullr. I'm confident in ultra-long-range sniping. After all, that's what I was developed for.
1000656902.korean: 내 이름은 X-02 우르. 초장거리 저격에 자신 있어. 애초에 그걸 위해 개발됐으니까.

1000656943.english: Please keep that in mind... As planned, today Constantia S2 and Vanilla A1 will attend to the master's needs, while the rest will handle administrative tasks with me.
1000656943.korean: 그 점 숙지하시고... 예정대로 오늘도 콘스탄챠 언니와 바닐라만 주인님의 시중을 맡고, 나머지는 저와 함께 행정 업무를 처리하겠어요.

1000656945.english: Serapias Alice... sister. What's the status of the large bathhouse construction that the informant reported yesterday?
1000656945.korean: 앨리스... 언니. 어제 첩이 올린 대욕탕 건설 관련한 건은 어떻게 되었느냐.

1000656949.english: According to Constantia S2's suggestion, I've revised the space for the master to be three times larger than before so that those who wish can bathe together.
1000656949.korean: 콘스탄챠 언니 의견으로 주인님을 위한 공간을 현재 안보다 세 배 크게 만들어서 희망자와 함께 몸을 씻으실 수 있도록 수정해뒀어요.

1000656967.english: If Sister Serapias Alice sees it, she'll definitely...

1000656971.english: The cleaning and organizing of the Orca Ho B sector corridor... if I remember correctly, that task was assigned to Miss KeumRan S7. But...
1000656971.korean: 오르카 호 B 섹터 복도 청소 및 정리의 건... 제가 기억하기로, 이건 금란 양이 맡았던 일감이네요. 그런데...

1000656984.english: Besides... Since the master had the panel confiscated, he must have come directly to Miss KeumRan S7 to ask, right?
1000656984.korean: 거기다... 주인님께선 패널을 압수당하셨으니, 금란 양에게 직접 와서 부탁하셨겠죠?

1000656994.english: Doesn't Serapias Alice unni dislike administrative work...?
1000656994.korean: 앨리스 언니는 행정 업무를 싫어하시지 않았나요...?

1000657004.english: - At first, the secretarial office was like a battlefield, but now that things have stabilized to some extent, I heard that Alpha and Cardinal Armand can finally breathe a sigh of relief.
1000657004.korean: - 처음에는 비서실이 전쟁터를 방불케 했지만, 어느정도 안정된 지금은 알파와 아르망도 한 숨을 돌릴 수 있다고 들었다.

1000657006.english: - As I got ready to leave and opened the captain's cabin door, Cardinal Armand was standing there.
1000657006.korean: - 나갈 채비를 하고 함장실 문을 열자, 아르망이 서있었다.

1000657011.english: - Cardinal Armand, who had entered the captain's cabin and naturally stood beside the desk, blushed slightly when I sat on the bed.
1000657011.korean: - 함장실에 들어와 자연스럽게 책상 옆에 섰던 아르망은 내가 침대에 앉자 살짝 얼굴을 붉혔다.

1000657020.english: - The expression on Cardinal Armand's face as he asked that was strange.

1000657025.english: - As I got up, Cardinal Armand reluctantly followed suit, looking quite disappointed.
1000657025.korean: - 내가 일어나자, 아르망은 못내 아쉬운 기색으로 따라 일어섰다.

1000657027.english: - Whether he knew my true feelings or not, Cardinal Armand was still diligently calculating future possibilities with a flushed face.
1000657027.korean: - 내 속마음을 아는지 모르는지, 아르망은 여전히 얼굴을 발갛게 물들인 채로 열심히 앞으로의 경우의 수를 계산하고 있었다.

1000657029.english: - He grabbed Cardinal Armand's wrists with both hands and threw him onto the bed.
1000657029.korean: - 아르망의 양 손목을 잡고 그대로 침대에 쓰러트렸다.

1000657034.english: - Unlike his usual relaxed and slightly mischievous demeanor, Cardinal Armand blushed and trembled.
1000657034.korean: - 평소의 여유있고 약간 짓궂기도 한 태도와 달리, 아르망은 얼굴을 붉히며 파르르 몸을 떨었다.

1000657037.english: - After blinking and fidgeting for a while, Cardinal Armand nodded his head almost imperceptibly.
1000657037.korean: - 한동안 눈을 깜빡이며 꼼지락대던 아르망은, 보일듯 말듯 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000657042.english: - Cardinal Armand looked up at me with a face that was both anxious and blank.
1000657042.korean: - 아르망은 애가 타는것도, 멍한 것도 같은 얼굴로 나를 올려다봤다.

1000657044.english: - Still held by my arms, Cardinal Armand, who had been desperately rubbing his knees, finally opened his mouth.
1000657044.korean: - 여전히 양 팔을 내게 붙들린채 애타게 무릎을 비비던 아르망이 겨우 입을 열었다.

1000657046.english: - Until he fell asleep from exhaustion, Cardinal Armand's predictions were never wrong.
1000657046.korean: - 지쳐 잠들 때까지, 아르망의 예측은 단 하나도 틀리지 않았다.

1000657106.english: - I roughly wiped my face with a towel soaked in warm water, sipped my coffee, and watched Constantia S2's fluid movements.
1000657106.korean: - 따뜻한 물에 적신 수건으로 대충 얼굴을 닦고, 커피를 홀짝이며 콘스탄챠의 물흐르는듯한 움직임을 구경했다.

1000657109.english: - I got out of bed and moved to my desk. I remember arguing with Constantia S2, who insisted on cleaning up after I left, even if it meant she had to die.
1000657109.korean: - 침대에서 일어나 책상으로 자리를 옮겼다. 죽어도 내가 자리를 비웠을때 정리하겠다는 콘스탄챠와 괜찮다고 실랑이를 벌였던 기억이 떠오른다.

1000657111.english: - I grabbed Constantia S2, who was about to leave the captain's cabin after emptying the trash can.
1000657111.korean: - 쓰레기통까지 비우고 함장실을 나가려는 콘스탄챠를 붙잡았다.

1000657114.english: - At my question, Constantia S2 followed me as if it were the most natural thing in the world.
1000657114.korean: - 내 물음에 콘스탄챠는 당연하다는듯이 나를 따라 나섰다.

1000657123.english: - Constantia S2, who had sat down beside me, carefully rested her head on my shoulder.
1000657123.korean: - 날 따라 앉은 콘스탄챠가 조심스럽게 어깨에 머리를 올렸다.

1000657126.english: - With Constantia S2's answer, a comfortable silence fell.
1000657126.korean: - 콘스탄챠의 대답과 함께 편안한 침묵이 내려앉았다.

1000657130.english: - After a moment of thought, with her index finger to her lips, Constantia S2 smiled broadly.
1000657130.korean: - 한동안 검지 손가락을 입가에 대고 생각하던 콘스탄챠가 활짝 웃었다.

1000657137.english: - Whether she understood the hidden meaning in my words, Constantia S2 laughed awkwardly.
1000657137.korean: - 내 말에 숨은 의미를 깨달았는지, 콘스탄챠는 난처하게 웃었다.

1000657140.english: - Slowly rising, Constantia S2 looked at the distant members.
1000657140.korean: - 천천히 몸을 일으킨 콘스탄챠가 멀리 보이는 대원들을 바라봤다.

1000657146.english: - That's inevitable. Constantia S2 has been... since I woke up. Because even this morning, right up until now, you've been waiting on me constantly.
1000657146.korean: - 그럴수밖에. 콘스탄챠는 내가 깨어났을때부터... 당장 오늘 아침까지도 줄곧, 내 시중을 들어왔으니까.

1000657149.english: - Constantia S2 was crying with a surprised expression.
1000657149.korean: - 콘스탄챠는 놀란 얼굴로 눈물을 흘리고 있었다.

1000657151.english: - I silently embraced Constantia S2, who was wiping away her tears with an awkward smile.
1000657151.korean: - 멋쩍게 웃으며 눈물을 닦는 콘스탄챠를 말없이 품에 안아 주었다.

1000657153.english: - After calming down and remaining in his embrace for a long time, Constantia S2 suddenly spoke.
1000657153.korean: - 진정하고 나서도 한참동안 안겨있던 콘스탄챠가 문득 입을 열었다.

1000657164.english: - I pulled away and kissed Constantia S2's lips lightly, who was feigning a look of dissatisfaction.
1000657164.korean: - 얼굴을 떼고 짐짓 불만스러운 표정을 짓는 콘스탄챠의 입술에 살짝 입을 맞췄다.

1000657165.english: Seeing Constantia S2 smile so brightly, as if just that alone made her incredibly happy, warmed my heart as well.
1000657165.korean: - 단지 그것만으로도 너무나 행복하다는듯 활짝 웃는 콘스탄챠를 보며, 나도 마음이 따뜻해졌다.

1000657171.english: - Nagging, pretending to be sulky, or just naturally cuddling like this... It was a side of Constantia S2 that couldn't be found in the old days.
1000657171.korean: - 잔소리를 하거나, 삐진 척을 하거나, 이렇게 자연스럽게 품에 안기는 건... 예전의 콘스탄챠에게선 찾아볼 수 없는 모습이었다.

1000657172.english: - Compared to back then, when I always smiled brightly, never said anything I didn't like, and just did what I was supposed to... I think the Constantia S2 of today is much more 'human'.
1000657172.korean: - 항상 방긋방긋 웃고, 싫은 소리는 절대로 하지 않고 할 일만 했던 그때에 비하면... 지금의 콘스탄챠는 훨씬 '인간적'이라고 생각한다.

1000657175.english: - Constantia S2, who had been smiling and exchanging light jokes, blushed slightly, as if lost in thought.
1000657175.korean: - 가벼운 농담을 하며 마주 웃던 콘스탄챠는, 무슨 생각을 했는지 살짝 얼굴을 붉혔다.

1000657178.english: - Perhaps because of the current atmosphere, I naturally thot of a bunny girl, but Constantia S2, in her usual way, said something very Constantia S2-like.
1000657178.korean: - 요새 분위기 때문인지 나는 자연스럽게 바니걸을 떠올렸지만, 콘스탄챠는 콘스탄챠다운 말을 내놓았다.

1000657182.english: He recalled the nite he spent with Constantia S2, her hair down and wearing a thin nightdress.
1000657182.korean: - 머리를 풀어내리고, 얇은 나이트 드레스를 걸친 콘스탄챠와 보냈던 밤을 떠올렸다.

1000657188.english: - Constantia S2 is more devoted at night than when she's serving, but I won't tolerate it just for today.
1000657188.korean: - 밤에는 시중을 들 때보다도 헌신적인 콘스탄챠이지만, 오늘만은 용납하지 않을 생각이다.

1000657266.english: - Royal Arsenal, who would come find me whenever he had a chance, whether he was alone, with his squad members, or with other members... I haven't heard from them in a while.
1000657266.korean: - 혼자오든, 부대원들과 함께오든, 다른 대원들과 함께 오든 틈날 때마다 나를 찾아오던 아스널이... 한동안 나를 찾지 않았다.

1000657267.english: - The manager is Ferro, but I heard it was Royal Arsenal who caused the trouble...
1000657267.korean: - 일단 점장은 페로지만, 일을 벌인 건 아스널이라고 듣긴 했는데...

1000657271.english: Captain Royal Arsenal? Just a moment.

1000657272.english: Captain Royal Arsenal~! Big Brother, the commander has arrived!

1000657275.english: - As Royal Arsenal said, the cafe was booming.

1000657282.english: - Royal Arsenal, who had led me to a corner seat in the hall, gave a small nod and went back to work.
1000657282.korean: - 나를 홀의 구석 자리로 안내해준 아스널은 작게 눈인사를 하곤 다시 일하러 가버렸다.

1000657283.english: If Cerestia of Life is the embodiment of motherhood, then Royal Arsenal can be said to be the embodiment of sexuality.
1000657283.korean: - 세레스티아가 모성의 화신이라면, 아스널은 성애의 화신이라고 할 수 있다.

1000657284.english: - Among the crew, there's probably no one more true to their emotions and desires than Royal Arsenal.
1000657284.korean: - 대원들 중에 아스널보다 자기 감정과 욕구에 충실한 사람은 아마 없겠지.

1000657285.english: - And that Royal Arsenal... Now, with a very happy expression, he is engrossed in his work at the cafe.
1000657285.korean: - 그런 아스널이... 지금은 몹시 즐거워보이는 얼굴로 카페 일에 열중하고 있다.

1000657286.english: - Sipping on a low-alcohol drink and chatting with the occasional teammate who joined me, my gaze still followed Royal Arsenal.
1000657286.korean: - 도수가 낮은 술을 홀짝거리며, 간간이 합석하는 대원들과 이야기를 나누면서도 내 시선은 아스널을 쫓았다.

1000657287.english: - There was a strange sense of déjà vu seeing Royal Arsenal serving with her long, flowing brown hair and laughing refreshingly while talking with the other members.
1000657287.korean: - 긴 갈색 생머리를 찰랑거리며 서빙을 하고, 다른 대원들과 이야기를 하며 시원하게 웃는 아스널의 모습에 묘한 기시감이 느껴졌다.

1000657288.english: - Royal Arsenal is a team that really indulges its desires, and I'm not one to shy away from that either, so most of the time we spend together is... I think we did more than just kiss; we probably had sex.
1000657288.korean: - 워낙 욕구에 충실한 아스널이고, 나도 그런건 별로 사양하지 않다보니 둘이서 보내는 시간은 대부분... 이 아니라 100% 몸을 섞었던 것 같다.

1000657290.english: - Whether or not he knew my heart was a little troubled, Royal Arsenal gave me a smile that seemed to melt every time our eyes met.
1000657290.korean: - 약간 착잡해진 내 마음을 아는지 모르는지, 아스널은 눈이 마주칠 때마다 녹아내릴 것 같은 눈웃음을 보냈다.

1000657294.english: In the quiet cafe, where not only the customers but also the staff had all left, Royal Arsenal headed toward the counter.
1000657294.korean: - 손님들은 물론, 직원들까지 전부 떠난 조용한 카페에서 아스널은 카운터로 향했다.

1000657296.english: - As far as I know, Royal Arsenal took a bottle of alcohol that wasn't very strong from the display case.
1000657296.korean: - 아스널은 내가 알기로 그렇게 도수가 높지 않은 술병을 진열장에서 꺼냈다.

1000657298.english: - I accepted the glass Royal Arsenal offered and lightly clinked it.
1000657298.korean: - 아스널이 내민 잔을 받고 가볍게 부딪혔다.

1000657301.english: - Somehow, I could understand it right away. The Royal Arsenal I saw during business hours definitely looked like they were having fun.
1000657301.korean: - 어쩐지 바로 납득할 수 있었다. 영업 시간 동안 본 아스널의 모습은, 틀림없이 즐거워 보였으니까.

1000657303.english: - Royal Arsenal leaned their elbows on the counter, gazing at the half-empty glass of liquor sparkling in the light.
1000657303.korean: - 아스널은 카운터에 팔꿈치를 괴고 조명에 반짝이는, 술이 반쯤 남아있는 잔을 바라봤다.

1000657307.english: - Royal Arsenal chuckled and emptied their glass.

1000657311.english: - Before I knew it, the Royal Arsenal was empty, so I filled my glass. Perhaps the alcohol was starting to kick in, as Royal Arsenal's face turned red.
1000657311.korean: - 어느새 비어버린 아스널과 내 잔을 채웠다. 살짝 술기운이 올라오는 것인지, 아스널의 얼굴이 붉어졌다.

1000657320.english: - Royal Arsenal unwrapped the chocolate wrapper on the counter and put it in their mouth. And then...
1000657320.korean: - 아스널은 카운터에 놓여있는 초콜릿 포장지를 벗기고 입에 넣었다. 그리곤...

1000657323.english: - Only when the chocolate had completely melted and the sweetness had disappeared from their mouths did Royal Arsenal slowly part their lips.
1000657323.korean: - 초콜릿이 전부 녹고, 입 안에서 달콤한 맛이 사라질때가 되어서야 아스널은 천천히 입술을 뗐다.

1000657325.english: - Royal Arsenal, who had responded to my words with a refreshing smile, headed toward the stage set up on one side.
1000657325.korean: - 내 말에 시원한 미소로 대답한 아스널은 한 쪽에 마련된 무대 쪽으로 향했다.

1000657327.english: - The accompaniment started, and when Royal Arsenal opened their mouths, I froze.
1000657327.korean: - 반주가 흘러나오고, 아스널이 입을 열자 나는 굳어져 버렸다.

1000657328.english: - A voice that's both ticklish and powerful, one I've never heard from Royal Arsenal before.
1000657328.korean: - 간질거리면서도 힘 있는, 아스널에게서 한 번도 들어보지 못한 목소리.

1000657329.english: - Until the song was completely over, I just watched Royal Arsenal singing, sending him sweet smiles.
1000657329.korean: - 노래가 전부 끝날 때까지, 나는 달콤한 눈웃음을 보내며 노래하는 아스널을 그저 바라보고만 있었다.

1000657331.english: - After the song ended, as I stood there blankly clapping, Royal Arsenal gave me their trademark cool smile.
1000657331.korean: - 노래가 끝나고 멍하니 박수를 치는 내게 아스널은 트레이드 마크인 시원한 미소를 보냈다.

1000657336.english: - I think it's not because the speaker is Royal Arsenal, but because we understand each other.
1000657336.korean: - 말하는 사람이 아스널이라서가 아닌, 서로 마음이 통하는 사이라서라고 생각한다.

1000657338.english: - After pondering for a while, I picked up the chocolate Royal Arsenal had given me.
1000657338.korean: - 한동안 궁리하다 아스널이 내게 먹여주었던 초콜릿을 집어들었다.

1000657339.english: - I peeled off the wrapper and held it out, and Royal Arsenal chuckled and bit the chocolate right off my finger.
1000657339.korean: - 포장지를 벗겨 내밀자, 아스널은 피식 웃으며 내 손가락째로 초콜릿을 입에 물었다.

1000657340.english: - Royal Arsenal closed his eyes, savoring the chocolate in his mouth, and playfully licked my finger.
1000657340.korean: - 아스널은 눈을 감은채, 음미하듯 초콜릿을 입에 물고 내 손가락을 장난스럽게 핥아올렸다.

1000657342.english: - Saying that, Royal Arsenal climbed onto the counter right in front of me.
1000657342.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 아스널은 내 바로 앞, 카운터 위에 올라 앉았다.

1000657344.english: - He stood up and wrapped his arms around Royal Arsenal's waist.
1000657344.korean: - 자리에서 일어나 아스널의 허리에 팔을 감았다.

1000657398.english: Then… in Cardinal Armand's prediction, what's the next development?
1000657398.korean: 그럼... 아르망의 예측에서, 이 다음 전개는 뭐야?

1000657431.english: You eat some too, Constantia S2.

1000657435.english: Is there anything you want to do, Constantia S2?
1000657435.korean: 콘스탄챠는 뭐 하고 싶은 거 없어?

1000657438.english: Not something related to me, but something you want to do, Constantia S2.
1000657438.korean: 나랑 관련된 거 말고, 콘스탄챠가 하고 싶은거.

1000657442.english: Now that I think about it… I don't think I've ever said thank you. To you, Constantia S2.
1000657442.korean: 생각해보니... 한 번도 고맙다고 한 적 없는 것 같아서. 콘스탄챠한테.

1000657447.english: Yeah. I can't get up unless Constantia S2 wakes me.
1000657447.korean: 응. 난 콘스탄챠가 안 깨워주면 못 일어나니까.

1000657449.english: It just happened. Just now. With you, Constantia S2.

1000657484.english: No. I'm just dropping by today. Is Royal Arsenal here?
1000657484.korean: 아냐. 오늘은 잠깐 들린거라. 아스널 있어?

1000657518.english: - It was CS Perrault, facing the mirror and singing with the cutest gestures and expressions.
1000657518.korean: - 거울을 마주보고, 한껏 귀여운 율동과 표정을 지으며 노래하는 페로였다.

1000657595.english: ...I see. Bunny King didn't like reverse-bunny—he liked me, NiBA. Looking back there were so many hints; why didn't I notice...? Yes, that was it. A pink mist called love blurred my vision...! Nihihi, now that the mist has cleared, I can seize true lo-o-ve...! Ah, ahaha... I overdid it a bit. It's so embarrassing... Huh? I have to say it too? N-now...? ...Um... I love you, Commander.
1000657595.korean: ...그렇구나. 바니 대왕 씨는 역바니가 아니라... 바로 나, 니바를 좋아하는 거였어. 돌이켜보면 힌트들이 정말 많았는데,&n어째서 몰랐던 걸까... 그래, 그거였어. 사랑이라는 이름의 핑크빛 안개가 내 시야를 흐리게 하고 있었던 거야...!&n니히히, 그 안개가 사라진 지금이야말로, 진정한 러-브를 쟁취할 수...! 아, 아하하... 살짝 오버했네. 영 부끄러워서...&n에? 나도 말해야 돼? 지, 지금...? ...그, 그게 있지. 음... 사랑해, 사령관 씨.

1000657605.english: Goltarion XIII, I have something serious to talk about.

1000657610.english: Huh? That's... NiBA from Densetsu and the boss...?
1000657610.korean: 어? 저건... 덴세츠의 니바 씨랑 사장님...?

1000657615.english: Because of that, we're coming up with countermeasures among ourselves. Magical BaekTo is helping too.
1000657615.korean: 그것 때문에 저희들끼리 대책을 세우는 중이에요. 백토님도 도와주고 계시구요.

1000657617.english: NiBA just joined not long ago, and already there are that many people...
1000657617.korean: 니바 씨가 합류한지 얼마 되지도 않았는데 벌써 저만큼 많은 분들과...

1000657623.english: ...I hope Magical BaekTo didn't hear that by any chance?

1000657636.english: D-Don't cry. Goltarion XIII, stop the tears.
1000657636.korean: 우, 울지 마요. 골타리온, 눈물 그쳐요.

1000657639.english: Goltarion XIII, the loyal subordinate of the Witch Queen Faucre who can make even crying children stop crying!
1000657639.korean: 우는 아이도 뚝 그치게 만드는 마의 여왕, 뽀끄루의 심복. 골타리온 XIII세여!

1000657641.english: Kuhuhuhu... Kahahahahaha! The Witch Legion Commander, Goltarion XIII. I have been eagerly awaiting the Great Demon King's summons.
1000657641.korean: 크흐흐... 크하하하하하하! 마의 군단장, 골타리온 XIII세. 대마왕님의 부름만을 목 놓아 기다렸습니다.

1000657647.english: I didn't expect Goltarion XIII to take the Demon King's army so seriously...
1000657647.korean: 골타리온이 마왕군을 이렇게까지 진지하게 생각했을 줄은...

1000657650.english: Have you checked the handouts, Faucre the Evil Overlord?

1000657664.english: ...Hehe, as expected of my loyal subordinate, Goltarion XIII. What a splendid mindset.
1000657664.korean: ...후후, 역시 나의 심복 골타리온. 훌륭한 마음가짐이구나.

1000657690.english: Idiot! What are you doing, Goltarion XIII! What if you're bothering someone else?!
1000657690.korean: 바보! 뭐하는 거예요, 골타리온! 다른 분한테 폐 끼치면 어떡해요!

1000657693.english: I'm sorry, Ignis-sama. Did Goltarion XIII cause trouble?

1000657701.english: Even if Goltarion XIII or I stray, he'll be there to correct us!
1000657701.korean: 저나 골타리온이 엇나가더라도 옆에서 바로잡아 주시겠죠!

1000657707.english: Understood. I will accept Faucre the Evil Overlord's offer.

1000657753.english: That's why I'm offering you half the world and the position of companion to Faucre the Evil Overlord.
1000657753.korean: 그래서 세계의 절반과 뽀끄루 대마왕님의 반려 자리를 가지고 제안하는 거다.

1000657768.english: Lady Atalanta the Nimble possesses physical strength strong enough to be active in the Red Arena, but...
1000657768.korean: 아탈란테님은 붉은 아레나에서 활동할 만큼 강인한 신체능력을 지녔습니다만.

1000657780.english: Goltarion XIII, stop...! You're being rude to Lady Atalanta the Nimble.

1000657786.english: Mr. Goltarion XIII is getting beaten up, shouldn't we stop it?
1000657786.korean: 골타리온 씨가 쥐어 터지고 있는데 말려야 되지 않겠습니까?

1000657787.english: If it's Goltarion XIII, it's okay, I trust him.

1000657790.english: Mr. Goltarion XIII will probably try to involve the commander again, which is troublesome.
1000657790.korean: 골타리온 씨가 또 사령관님을 끌어들이자고 하실 텐데, 곤란하군요.

1000657802.english: Atalanta-san? Weren't you with Goltarion XIII?
1000657802.korean: 아탈란테님? 골타리온이랑 같이 있던 거 아니었나요?

1000657811.english: Faucre the Evil Overlord, is the proposal from earlier still valid?
1000657811.korean: 뽀끄루님. 아까 전의 제안, 아직 유효하나요?

1000657817.english: Kuh-huh-huh...! The power that defies death truly symbolizes Goltarion XIII, the loyal servant of the Faucre the Evil Overlord.
1000657817.korean: 크흐흐흐...! 죽음을 거스르는 권능이야말로 뽀끄루 대마왕님의 심복, 골타리온 XIII세를 상징하지.

1000657822.english: Now that Atalanta the Nimble has joined us, only one spot remains!
1000657822.korean: 아탈란테님께서 들어와주셨으니 이제 남은 건 한 자리!

1000657830.english: Sadius of Retribution?! Is there such a law? It's the first time I've heard of it...
1000657830.korean: 사디어스님?! 그, 그런 법률도 있었나요? 전 처음 들어봤는데...

1000657849.english: Atalanta the Nimble, what were you arrested for?

1000657869.english: Goltarion XIII? Enough. The electricity from Sadias's whip—uugh!
1000657869.korean: 골타리온? 그만 하세요. 사디어스님의 채찍에서 전기가... 으앙!

1000657899.english: From now on, please trust and wait only for me, Goltarion XIII, the Demon King's loyal subordinate.
1000657899.korean: 지금부터는 마왕님의 심복인 저, 골타리온만 믿고 기다려 주십시오.

1000657911.english: How does the fruit of corruption you're eating taste, Inspector SD3M Pupp Head...? Kuhuhuhu...! Hahahahahahahaha!
1000657911.korean: 지금 먹고 있는 타락의 열매는 어떤 맛인가, 펍헤드 경위...? 크흐흐흐....! 크하하하하하하하하!

1000657915.english: Explain yourself, Inspector SD3M Pupp Head.

1000657930.english: Join the Demon King's army and support Faucre the Evil Overlord by their side!
1000657930.korean: 마왕군에 들어와서, 뽀끄루 대마왕님을 옆에서 보좌해다오!

1000657933.english: Faucre the Evil Overlord has, for the first time, said they want to rebuild the Demon King's army.
1000657933.korean: 뽀끄루 대마왕님께서 처음으로 마왕군을 재건하자 하셨다.

1000657938.english: He asked me, Goltarion XIII, to help revive the Demon King's Army for the first time...!
1000657938.korean: 이 골타리온에게, 처음으로 마왕군을 부활시키자고 제안해 주셨는데...!

1000657942.english: Be the strength of Faucre the Evil Overlord. I beg you...

1000657967.english: I told you to make sure I witness every contract signing, Goltarion XIII.
1000657967.korean: 계약할 때 꼭 절 참관시켜달라고 말씀드렸잖습니까, 골타리온 씨.

1000657969.english: This is truly the way of our Demon King's Army—evil at its finest! Isn't that right, Faucre the Evil Overlord?
1000657969.korean: 이것이야말로 우리 마왕군, 악의 방식! 그렇지 않습니까, 뽀끄루 대마왕님!

1000657972.english: Goltarion XIII... whimper... really, not even a day has passed...
1000657972.korean: 골타리온... 히잉... 정말 하루도 안 돼서...

1000657981.english: P-3M Undine, is the tart ready?

1000657983.english: AG-1 Nereid, do we still have any whipped cream left?

1000657985.english: P-3M Undine, behind you! Look behind you!

1000658033.english: - I see AG-1 Nereid promoting in front of the fountain.

1000658034.english: - She's actively promoting it, just like a AG-1 Nereid. Should I just take one and go?
1000658034.korean: - 네레이드답게 활발하게 홍보 중이다. 한장 받고 갈까.

1000658038.english: - AG-1 Nereid, upon seeing me, fidgeted awkwardly in her stance.
1000658038.korean: - 나를 본 네레이드는 엉거주춤한 자세로 꼼지락거렸다.

1000658042.english: - When I opened the basket hanging on AG-1 Nereid's arm, it was full of flyers. It's going to take quite a while to hand them all out...
1000658042.korean: - 네레이드의 팔에 걸린 바구니를 열어 보니 전단지로 가득했다. 다 나눠주려면 꽤 걸리겠는데...

1000658044.english: - Despite AG-1 Nereid's refusal, I cupped my hands around my mouth and shouted with all my might.
1000658044.korean: - 네레이드의 거절에도, 나는 입가에 손바닥을 대고 힘껏 소리쳤다.

1000658053.english: - Sitting on the bench, I handed the water bottle I had brought to AG-1 Nereid.
1000658053.korean: - 벤치에 앉으며 들고 왔던 물통을 네레이드에게 건넸다.

1000658059.english: - Their nervous reaction was amusing. As I was about to bring the water bottle to my mouth, AG-1 Nereid, with a mournful expression, clung to me, trying to snatch it away.
1000658059.korean: - 안절부절 못하는 반응이 재밌었다. 입에 물병을 갖다대려 하니, 울상이 된 네레이드가 뺏으려고 달라붙어왔다.

1000658066.english: - AG-1 Nereid's shy reaction was so refreshing that I couldn't help but laugh.

1000658067.english: - How did AG-1 Nereid, who used to love exercising and was so easygoing, end up becoming such a shy person?
1000658067.korean: - 운동을 좋아하고, 털털하던 네레이드가 어쩌다 부끄럼쟁이가 됐을까.

1000658077.english: - With time, people usually become more at ease, but since this is all new to AG-1 Nereid, it'll just take a little longer.
1000658077.korean: - 시간이 지나면 여유가 생기기 마련인데, 네레이드는 이번에 모든 게 처음이니까. 조금 더 걸리는 거겠지.

1000658083.english: - I took AG-1 Nereid's hand. Even though she was new to romance, the shy girl slowly clasped mine in return.
1000658083.korean: - 네레이드의 손을 잡았다. 연애가 처음인 소녀도 수줍어하면서 천천히 맞잡아왔다.

1000658099.english: - Knowing the purpose of the clothes, the AG-1 Nereid blushed but didn't let go of my hand and followed me.
1000658099.korean: - 옷의 사용처를 알고 있는 네레이드는 얼굴을 붉히면서도 내 손을 놓지 않고 따라왔다.

1000658101.english: - That day, AG-1 Nereid was unable to return to the cafe.

1000658112.english: Yeah. Salacia came over last time too.

1000658118.english: The genius pastry chef, P-3M Undine! If there's anything you want to eat, just say it. I'll make it for you right away.
1000658118.korean: 천재 파티시에르, 운디네라구! 뭐든 먹고 싶은 거 있으면 말해. 금방 만들어줄 테니까.

1000658126.english: - It was something P-3M Undine could be confident about. It was delicious. It melts gently in your mouth, and when you swallow, the lemon flavor lingers on your tongue.
1000658126.korean: - 운디네가 자신 있어 할 만했다. 맛있었다. 입에 넣으면 살살 녹아내리고, 목구멍으로 넘기면 혀 위에 레몬 풍미가 감돈다.

1000658129.english: - As I mentioned the names of the desserts I saw in the information storage area, P-3M Undine nodded vigorously.
1000658129.korean: - 정보 보관 구역에서 본 디저트의 명칭들을 얘기하자, 운디네가 힘차게 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000658131.english: - Confidently answering and entering the kitchen, P-3M Undine soon began cooking. Whisking as if I had multiple bodies, I also adjusted the oven.
1000658131.korean: - 자신만만하게 대답하고 주방에 들어간 운디네는 곧 요리를 시작했다. 몸이 여러 개라도 되는 것처럼 휘핑을 치다가도 오븐을 조정했다.

1000658132.english: - Watching P-3M Undine's back as she skillfully cooks, it's just like...
1000658132.korean: - 능숙히 조리하는 운디네의 뒷모습을 보고 있자니 꼭...

1000658138.english: - Did I ask for too much without any shame? I was worried, but P-3M Undine made all the desserts in a short amount of time.
1000658138.korean: - 염치없이 많은 걸 부탁한 건 아닌가? 걱정했는데, 운디네는 짧은 시간만에 모든 디저트를 만들어냈다.

1000658139.english: - Everything tastes good. Even though P-3M Undine's career as a pastry chef was short, her desserts were above average.
1000658139.korean: - 뭘 먹어도 맛있다. 운디네가 파티시에르로 활약한 경력은 짧았어도 수준급 이상의 디저트였다.

1000658143.english: - Just yesterday, I saw P-3M Undine order a large quantity of food ingredients. Even after closing hours, they must have practiced without rest.
1000658143.korean: - 어제만 해도 운디네가 대량으로 식재료를 발주한 걸 봤다. 영업이 끝나도 쉬지 않고 연습했겠지.

1000658144.english: - I thot it was very P-3M Undine-like of her to attribute her achievements, which were the result of constant effort, to natural talent, and not to gloss over the time she must have struggled.
1000658144.korean: - 끊임없는 노력 끝에 얻어낸 성과를 타고 난 재능이라고, 고생했을 시간을 포장하지 않는 모습이 운디네답다고 생각했다.

1000658147.english: - I thought of a menu to ask the smug P-3M Undine.

1000658156.english: - The moment P-3M Undine remembered what had happened then, her face flushed instantly.
1000658156.korean: - 그때 무슨 일이 있었는지 떠올린 운디네의 얼굴이 순식간에 달아올랐다.

1000658158.english: - As I took a step forward, the P-3M Undine took a step back.
1000658158.korean: - 내가 한발짝 다가가자, 운디네가 한발짝 물러섰다.

1000658160.english: - Another step. P-3M Undine's back is blocked by the cooking area, so she can't retreat any further.
1000658160.korean: - 다시 한발짝. 운디네의 뒤는 조리대로 막혀있어 더 이상 물러날 수 없다.

1000658167.english: - When I pointed to the special menu on the menu, P-3M Undine was very flustered.
1000658167.korean: - 메뉴판에 스페셜 메뉴를 가리키자 운디네가 몹시 당황했다.

1000658176.english: - P-3M Undine lay down on the countertop and pulled at my collar. With them pressed close enough to hear each other's heartbeats, P-3M Undine placed her palms on my cheeks.
1000658176.korean: - 운디네가 조리대 위로 누우며 내 옷깃을 잡아당겼다. 서로의 심장소리가 들릴 만큼 밀착한 상태에서 운디네가 내 볼에 두 손바닥을 갖다댔다.

1000658184.english: - When asked if he could order again, the P-3M Undine refused, but after persistent pleading, she relented on the condition that it be only once.
1000658184.korean: - 또 다시 주문해도 되냐는 물음에 운디네는 거절했지만, 끈질기게 부탁하니 단 한번이라는 조건으로 허락해줬다.

1000658259.english: - Even the next day, when P-3M Undine, who had gone to work, returned and woke us with a blush, we were still asleep, holding each other tightly.
1000658259.korean: - 다음날 출근한 운디네가 얼굴을 붉히며 깨워줄 때에도, 우리는 꼭 껴안은 채 잠들어 있었다.

1000658281.english: It's called "Heart-Pounding Stick Snack Game with MH-4 Thetis"!

1000658288.english: Hahaha. How is it? Sounds like it would be fun, right? Then, um, since MH-4 Thetis will be holding it first...
1000658288.korean: 꺄하핫. 어때요? 재밌을 것 같죠? 그, 그럼 테티스가 먼저 물고 있을 테니까...

1000658305.english: - I dipped my finger in MH-4 Thetis's outstretched lips and put it in my mouth. Indeed, I could taste the unique sweetness of honey.
1000658305.korean: - 테티스가 내미는 입술에 손가락을 찍어서 입에 넣었다. 과연 벌꿀 특유의 달콤함이 느껴졌다.

1000658309.english: - MH-4 Thetis, who had gotten off my body, sat on the bed and turned her back.
1000658309.korean: - 내 몸에서 내려간 테티스는 침대에 앉아 등을 돌려버렸다.

1000658313.english: - After apologizing and brushing MH-4 Thetis's hair, she finally turned around slowly. It seems their anger hasn't completely subsided, as their gaze is still sharp.
1000658313.korean: - 사과하며 테티스의 머리카락을 빗겨줬더니 그제야 천천히 뒤를 돌아봤다. 화가 완전히 풀리진 않았는지 눈초리가 매섭다.

1000658318.english: - I pulled MH-4 Thetis, who was trying to get up, and hugged her. I carefully touched his glossy lips with my finger.
1000658318.korean: - 일어나려는 테티스를 당겨서 끌어 안았다. 조심스럽게 윤기나는 입술에 손가락을 댔다.

1000658329.english: - As if my prediction had come true, MH-4 Thetis soon turned back with a smile.
1000658329.korean: - 예상이 들어맞았는지, 곧 테티스가 웃는 얼굴로 돌아봐왔다.

1000658331.english: - At the same time as a playful laugh, I was pushed over. MH-4 Thetis, who had climbed onto my body, took a stick snack out of her bosom.
1000658331.korean: - 장난기 섞인 웃음소리와 동시에 밀려 넘어졌다. 내 몸에 올라탄 테티스가 품에서 막대 과자를 꺼냈다.

1000658333.english: - As I vowed to win, MH-4 Thetis bit into a stick biscuit. Didn't I go first...?
1000658333.korean: - 승리를 다짐하는 내게 테티스가 막대 과자를 물렸다. 내가 선공 아니었나...?

1000658335.english: From now on, we'll only attack MH-4 Thetis.

1000658338.english: - With a sharp, crisp sound, MH-4 Thetis's face drew closer...
1000658338.korean: - 똑, 똑 부러지는 소리와 함께 테티스의 얼굴이 가까워지고...

1000658342.english: - Before he knew it, the outcome of the match seemed unimportant, and MH-4 Thetis was absorbed in the game.
1000658342.korean: - 어느새 승부 같은 건 아무래도 좋아진듯, 테티스는 정신없이 몰두했다.

1000658343.english: - It started as a joke, but before I knew it, I was also immersed, tightly hugging MH-4 Thetis's body, which was trembling...
1000658343.korean: - 장난스럽게 시작했지만, 어느새 나도 움찔거리는 테티스의 몸을 꼭 안아주며 몰입했고...

1000658367.english: It's not that AG-1 Nereid is strange.

1000658413.english: If P-3M Undine says no, you can't force it.
1000658413.korean: 운디네가 안 된다는데 강요해선 안 되잖아.

1000658490.english: I started wanting to eat MH-4 Thetis's menu. Can I order?
1000658490.korean: 테티스의 메뉴가 먹고 싶어져서. 주문해도 돼?

1000658494.english: I want to eat MH-4 Thetis's menu.
1000658494.korean: 난 테티스 메뉴가 먹고 싶은 거야.

1000658503.english: - While watching a Magical MoMo animation shoulder to shoulder in the captain's cabin, I realized that Magical MoMo sitting next to me was covering her face.
1000658503.korean: - 함장실에서 어깨를 맞대고 모모 애니메이션을 보던 중, 옆에 앉아 있는 모모가 얼굴을 가리고 있다는 것을 깨달았다.

1000658505.english: - When I asked Magical MoMo if she had ever seen the Magical MoMo anime, she shook her head slightly.
1000658505.korean: - 모모 애니메이션을 한 번도 본 적 없냐는 내 물음에 모모는 작게 고개를 저었다.

1000658506.english: No... I've seen it a lot with Magical BaekTo and Faucre the Evil Overlord...
1000658506.korean: 아뇨... 백토랑 뽀끄루랑 같이 많이 봤는데...

1000658510.english: - Magical MoMo, who appeared on screen wearing a jet-black dress, smiled seductively at Hakuto.
1000658510.korean: - 새까만 드레스를 입고 등장한 화면 속의 모모는, 백토를 보고 요염하게 웃었다.

1000658513.english: - He pulled Magical MoMo closer, embraced her, and sealed her, then interlocked his fingers to stop her hand from turning off the screen.
1000658513.korean: - 모모를 끌어당겨 품에 안아 봉인하고, 화면을 끄려는 손을 깍지끼워 저지했다.

1000658514.english: I'm sorry. Magical MoMo is... I'm not a magical girl anymore. ]
1000658514.korean: [ 미안해요. 모모는... 더이상 마법 소녀가 아니게 되어버렸어요. ]

1000658515.english: [ The Magic Gentleman... Because he took Magical MoMo's entire body and soul... ♡ ]
1000658515.korean: [ 매직 젠틀맨이... 모모의 몸과 마음을 전부 가져갔으니까...♡ ]

1000658516.english: - I remembered Magical MoMo's Setting, which was forcibly implanted by EB-48G Hraesvelgr.
1000658516.korean: - 흐레스벨그에게 강제로 주입당한 모모의 설정을 떠올렸다.

1000658519.english: - Because Black Magical MoMo appeared near the end of the video, the ending credits and a message announcing the release date of the next movie soon followed.
1000658519.korean: - 블랙 모모가 등장한 건 영상이 거의 끝나갈 때쯤이었기 때문에, 곧 엔딩 크레딧과 다음 극장판 개봉일을 예고하는 문구가 올라왔다.

1000658520.english: - As I simply tried to find the next movie in the playlist and play it, Magical MoMo, who had been covering her face the whole time, began to squirm.
1000658520.korean: - 간단히 재생목록에서 다음 극장판을 찾아 재생하려 하자, 줄곧 얼굴을 가리고 있던 모모가 몸부림치기 시작했다.

1000658526.english: - As the video turned off, Magical MoMo let out a sigh of relief.
1000658526.korean: - 영상을 꺼버리자 모모는 안도의 한숨을 내쉬었다.

1000658527.english: ... Commander, do you like it? Black Magical MoMo.

1000658528.english: - It's definitely a side of Magical MoMo you wouldn't normally imagine, so maybe it gives off a fresh charm...
1000658528.korean: - 아무래도 평소의 모모에게선 상상할 수 없는 모습이니까 신선한 매력이 느껴지려나...

1000658529.english: - Magical MoMo's face flushed slightly at my answer.
1000658529.korean: - 내 대답에 모모가 살짝 얼굴을 붉혔다.

1000658532.english: - Back then, I should have listened more carefully to Magical MoMo's words.
1000658532.korean: - 그때 난, 모모의 말을 좀 더 귀담아 들었어야 했다.

1000658533.english: - Magical MoMo is... Because he was truly a professional.

1000658535.english: - She said she was going to change and left, but the person who returned wasn't the usually shy Magical MoMo, but a little devil who, as soon as she entered the room, threw me onto the bed, climbed on top of me, and gave me a sweet smile.
1000658535.korean: - 갈아입고 오겠다며 나갔다가 돌아온 것은 평소의 수줍음 타는 모모가 아니라, 방에 들어오자마자 나를 침대에 쓰러트리고 올라타 달콤한 미소를 짓는 소악마였다.

1000658537.english: - Whispering in my ear, Magical MoMo slowly, very slowly, with her lower body pressed against mine... She began to move her waist as if tempting.
1000658537.korean: - 귓가에 속삭인 모모는 하반신을 밀착한 상태로 천천히, 아주 천천히... 유혹하듯 허리를 움직이기 시작햇다.

1000658540.english: - At my words, Magical MoMo chuckled seductively and brought her fingertips to my chest.
1000658540.korean: - 내 말에 모모는 쿡, 하고 요염하게 웃으며 손 끝을 내 가슴팍에 가져다 댔다.

1000658543.english: - Magical MoMo's slender fingers slowly traced up my neck and soon reached my lips.
1000658543.korean: - 모모의 가느다란 손가락이 천천히 내 목을 쓸어올리고, 곧 입술에 닿았다.

1000658544.english: Your friend, Magical Magical MoMo, is not...
1000658544.korean: 어린이 여러분의 친구, 매지컬 모모가 아니라...

1000658546.english: - Soon, Magical MoMo hugged my neck and brought her face close.
1000658546.korean: - 곧, 모모는 내 목을 끌어안으며 얼굴을 가까이 했다.

1000658549.english: - Magical MoMo... No, the moment Black Magical MoMo whispered and licked my lips,
1000658549.korean: - 모모... 아니, 블랙 모모가 속삭이며 내 입술을 핥은 순간,

1000658718.english: - What's not working? NiBA is still struggling with the mascot costume.
1000658718.korean: - 뭐가 잘 안되는지, 니바는 여전히 인형탈과 씨름하고 있다.

1000658734.english: - All my attention and consciousness are entirely focused on NiBA.
1000658734.korean: - 내 모든 시선과 의식은 전부, 니바에게 향해있다.

1000658736.english: - I... I'm looking at NiBA's costume.

1000658750.english: - I, who have lived with all sorts of charming crew members... Because it made me approach NiBA as if I were mesmerized.
1000658750.korean: - 온갖 매력적인 대원들과 함께 살아온 내가... 니바에게 홀린듯 다가가게 만들었으니까.

1000658782.english: - NiBA's condition seems a bit strange. Blushing and squirming around like...
1000658782.korean: - 니바의 상태가 좀 이상한데. 얼굴을 붉히고, 몸을 배배꼬는게 마치...

1000658786.english: ... Ni, nihehe. To see through the one and only weakness of this Bunny Slayer NiBA in an instant! As expected of the wicked King Bunny!
1000658786.korean: ...니, 니히히. 이 바니 슬레이어 니바의 유.일.한 약점을 단번에 꿰뚫어 보다니! 역시 사악한 바니 대왕 씨로구나!

1000658795.english: - NiBA, who had run over in a flurry, hugged my waist.
1000658795.korean: - 종종종 달려온 니바는 내 허리를 끌어안았다.

1000658805.english: - NiBA's body, which had been tightly embracing my waist and whispering, pulled away.
1000658805.korean: - 내 허리를 꼭 끌어안고 속삭이던 니바의 몸이 떨어졌다.

1000658810.english: - Sensing my disappointment, NiBA quickly continued speaking.
1000658810.korean: - 내가 실망한 것을 눈치챘는지 니바가 급히 말을 이었다.

1000658812.english: - NiBA, who had approached again, carefully kept her body from touching mine and brought her face close to my ear.
1000658812.korean: - 다시 다가온 니바는, 몸이 닿지 않도록 조심하며 내 귓가에 얼굴을 가까이했다.

1000658854.english: - I followed NiBA and arrived at the outer edge of the ark.

1000658878.english: - NiBA, who boldly held out a carrot, ran away immediately as soon as Titania glared at her.
1000658878.korean: - 호기롭게 당근을 들이댔던 니바는 티타니아가 째려보자마자 호다닥 도망가버렸다.

1000658904.english: - NiBA ran to them with a deeply moved expression.
1000658904.korean: - 니바는 몹시 감격한 얼굴로 둘에게 달려갔다.

1000658908.english: - With just T-20S Gnome, B-7 Strato Angel, Titania, and NiBA, my blood is already oversaturated with reverse bunny.
1000658908.korean: - 노움, 스트라토 엔젤, 티타니아, 니바 넷 만으로도 내 혈중 역바니 농도는 과포화 상태.

1000659016.english: Ah, reverse Vanilla A1... It's a great costume, isn't it? I was actually thinking of suggesting that for our uniforms at first.
1000659016.korean: 아아, 역바니라... 훌륭한 의상이지. 나도 처음엔 우리 유니폼을 그걸로 하자고 할까 생각했었다구.

1000659153.english: I won't blame you, Sergeant T-20S Gnome. It was a fate I had to accept eventually anyway.
1000659153.korean: 너를 탓하진 않겠어, 노움 병장. 어차피 언젠가는 받아들였어야만 하는 운명이었으니까.

1000659157.english: But... I am now Sergeant M-5 Efreeti.

1000659158.english: Come here, Sergeant T-20S Gnome. From now on, I won't waste a single second taking you down!
1000659158.korean: 와라, 노움 병장. 지금부터 널 쓰러트리는데에, 단 1초도 낭비하지 않겠다!

1000659167.english: So I left Faucre the Evil Overlord in charge... We even went thru the final ritual together...
1000659167.korean: 그래서 뽀끄루를 맡겼고... 너와 마지막 의식까지 치렀던 건데...

1000659181.english: - Of course, there's no bloodshed, but the battle of beliefs between T-20S Gnome and M-5 Efreeti, and NiBA and Magical BaekTo is intensifying more and more.
1000659181.korean: - 당연히 피가 튀는 건 아니지만, 노움과 이프리트, 니바와 백토간의 신념을 건 전투는 점점 격화되고 있다.

1000659198.english: - I nodded to NiBA, took a deep breath, and calmed my mind.
1000659198.korean: - 니바에게 고개를 끄덕여주고 심호흡을 해 마음을 가라앉혔다.

1000659201.english: - With the help of Royal Arsenal and Azaz, they raided and seized Cafe Amor while holding an operational meeting. During this, Niba, who had disappeared somewhere, reappeared and held out a piece of cloth.
1000659201.korean: - 아스널과 아자즈의 도움으로 카페 아모르를 습격, 탈취하고 작전 회의를 하던 도중, 어디론가 사라졌던 니바가 천조각을 내밀었다.

1000659207.english: - Seeing me speechless at the unexpected turn of events, NiBA's expression hardened.
1000659207.korean: - 예상 외의 전개에 차마 말을 잇지 못하는 나를 보며, 니바의 표정이 굳어졌다.

1000659216.english: - But... That reverse-bunny maniac named NiBA would never tolerate it.
1000659216.korean: - 하지만... 이 니바라는 이름의 역바니 광인은 그것을 결코 용납하지 않을 터.

1000659231.english: - There was NiBA, holding out a carrot and smiling brightly.
1000659231.korean: - 당근을 들이대고 환하게 웃고 있는 니바가 있었다.

1000659239.english: Then, King Bunny, I trust you! NiBA trusts King Bunny!
1000659239.korean: 그럼 바니 대왕 씨~ 나 믿는다~ 니바는 바니 대왕 씨 믿어~

1000659265.english: - Lying spread-eagled on the lawn, NiBA rested her face on my chest and said with a cool smile.
1000659265.korean: - 잔디밭에 대자로 누워있는 내 가슴팍에 얼굴을 올린 니바는 시원한 미소를 지으며 말했다.

1000659274.english: Reverse Vanilla A1... Is this the beginning of a new era...?

1000659276.english: - Answering NiBA and looking at Ferro, Ferro let out a deep sigh.
1000659276.korean: - 니바에게 대답하고 페로를 바라보자, 페로는 한숨을 포옥 내쉬었다.

1000659299.english: Bunny? NiBA! A chaotic reverse bunny girl commotion! To be continued in the epilog.
1000659299.korean: < 바니? 니바! 우당탕탕 역바니 대소동! > 후일담에서 계속.

1000659397.english: Th-then why did you follow NiBA?
1000659397.korean: 그, 그럼 왜 니바를 따라 온거야?

1000659407.english: M-5 Efreeti... so you've made up your mind-NiBA?

1000659410.english: W-wait a moment. Magical BaekTo. I can explain everything...!
1000659410.korean: 자, 잠깐만. 백토. 내가 다 설명할 수 있어...!

1000659467.english: - Me lying down, Griffon and Constantia S2 looking down at me. And Bori.
1000659467.korean: - 누워 있는 나와, 그런 나를 내려다보는 그리폰과 콘스탄챠. 그리고 보리.

1000659497.english: - But a lot has changed since then. P/A-00 Griffon sighing like that and Constantia S2 smiling awkwardly... I wouldn't have imagined that before... Wait?
1000659497.korean: - 하지만 그때랑은 많은 것이 바뀌었다. 이렇게 푹 한숨을 내쉬는 그리폰과 난처하게 웃는 콘스탄챠라니, 이전이라면 상상도… 어라?

1000659503.english: - Confused, Constantia S2 handed me a suit.
1000659503.korean: - 혼란에 빠진 나에게 콘스탄챠는 정장 한 벌을 내밀었다.

1000659537.english: The fortune said Hachiko of Castling's wish would come true this year, but I didn't expect it to happen so soon! Though it feels like I've used up the rest of my luck... Master will always be by my side, and that alone makes Hachiko of Castling of Castling lucky! As Master has made me happy, I will bring you lots of blessings too!
1000659537.korean: 점괘에서 올해 하치코 소원이 이뤄진다고 나왔는데, 이렇게 빨리 될 줄은 몰랐어요! 대신 남은 운을&n전부 써버린 것 같지만... 주인님이 늘 곁에 있어 주실 테니까, 그것만으로도 하치코는 행운아예요!&n주인님이 절 행복하게 만들어 주신 만큼 저도 복 많이 가져다드릴게요!

1000659538.english:
Huh? You’ve finally decided to join the cause too, big brother?”
“Good choice! I’ll issue your certificate right away—first, read the project overview.”
“I’ve already prepared your seat for you.”
“But before that…”
“Shall we finish our vow ceremony—something even more important than world domination?”
“Big brother, thanks for always going along with me.”
“I love you~
1000659538.korean: 응? 오빠도 드디어 대의에 함께할 생각이 든 거야? 잘 생각했어! 증명서는 바로 발급해 줄 테니까,&n일단 프로젝트 개요부터 읽어봐. 자리도 미리 준비해놨어. 음... 그래도 그전에...&n세계 정복보다도 더 중요한 서약식을 마무리해볼까? 오빠, 항상 나한테 맞춰줘서 고마워. 사랑해~

1000659543.english: -Is it CS Perrault who came to wake me today? It's been a while since it whined like this.

1000659544.english: -Since I still didn't want to leave the soft bed, I hugged CS Perrault and tried to sleep a little longer… but…?
1000659544.korean: - 아직 푹신한 침대에서 벗어나기 싫었던터라, 페로를 껴안으며 좀 더 자려고... 했는... 데...?

1000659545.english: -CS Perrault isn't that big, but was it really small enough to fit right into my arms like this…?

1000659550.english: -...Judging from the cry and appearance, it seems to be a cat, but strangely it resembles CS Perrault…
1000659550.korean: - ...일단 울음 소리와 생김새를 보면 고양이인 것 같기는 한데, 묘하게 페로와 닮은 게...

1000659567.english: -The strange creature that had been quietly nestled… no, since it resembled CS Perrault…

1000659568.english: -The Mini CS Perrault that had been quietly nestled suddenly let out a cry.
1000659568.korean: - 얌전히 안겨 있던 미니 페로가 별안간 울음 소리를 냈다.

1000659571.english: -At my desperate attempt to soothe it, Mini CS Perrault finally quieted down.
1000659571.korean: - 내 필사적인 달래기에 미니 페로는 간신히 조용해졌다.

1000659597.english: -With Mini CS Perrault tilting its head as if asking what I was saying, I held it in my arms and groped around for the light switch.
1000659597.korean: - 무슨 말을 하냐는듯 고개를 갸웃하는 미니 페로를 품 안에 안고 손을 더듬어 조명 스위치를 찾았다.

1000659608.english: -The Mini CS Perrault in my arms suddenly unsheathed its claws and lunged at Doctor… Doctorman.
1000659608.korean: - 품에 안겨있던 미니 페로는 갑자기 발톱을 세우곤, 닥터... 닥터맨에게 달려들었다.

1000659621.english: So… after that, I, wearing some strange mask, and a shrunken CS Perrault-Big Sis…

1000659751.english: Lily Bloommerchen. Red rose. Hibiscus. Lilac. Tulip. Lisianthus. Sunflower. Calla.
1000659751.korean: 백합. 붉은 장미. 히비스커스. 라일락. 튤립. 리시안사스. 해바라기. 카라.

1000659766.english: - Dahlia, Lily Bloommerchen. Red rose. Hibiscus. Lilac. Tulip. Lisianthus. Sunflower. Calla...

1000659787.english: - Serapias Alice was the first to rush over when she heard the alarm.
1000659787.korean: - 알람을 듣고 앨리스가 제일 먼저 달려왔다.

1000659789.english: - At my answer, Serapias Alice let out a sigh of relief and examined the room I had just been in.
1000659789.korean: - 내 대답에 앨리스는 안도의 한숨을 내쉬고 내가 방금 전까지 있던 방을 살폈다.

1000659803.english: - While walking around the Orca, wild Neodym, X-05 Emily, and Kaen appeared.
1000659803.korean: - 오르카 호를 거닐고 있으니 야생의 네오딤, 에밀리, 카엔이 나타났다.

1000659806.korean: - 카엔의 말이 끝나자마자 네오딤이 마라카스를 흔들고, 에밀리가 트라이앵글을 치기 시작했다.

1000659851.english: T-2 Brownie said when singing, what matters isn't singing well or badly, but how much heart you put into it.
1000659851.korean: 브라우니가 노래를 부를 때 중요한 것은 잘 부르고 못 부르고가 아니라 얼마나 마음이 담겨 있느냐라고 했어.

1000660002.english: Ah. It's fine. Thanks, Serapias Alice.

1000660084.english: He could have said she's as pure as a Lily Bloommerchen of the valley, so cute he wants to protect her, or that she looks like a princess from some kingdom—sweet compliments that make your chest tickle.
1000660084.korean: 방울꽃처럼 청초하다느니, 지켜주고 싶을 정도로 귀엽다느니, 어느 나라의 공주님 같다느니 하는 가슴 간질간질한 칭찬을 해도 될 텐데요.

1000660401.english: Vanilla A1, what brings you here at this hour?
1000660401.korean: 바닐라 씨, 이 시간에는 무슨 일이신가요?

1000660598.english: - And besides, all my clothes are made by Audrey Dreamweaver anyway.
1000660598.korean: - 그리고 어차피 내 옷은 오드리가 전부 만들어주고.

1000660634.english: To show Commander the prettiest version of myself, I got help from Borren and Audrey Dreamweaver.
1000660634.korean: 사령관님과 데이트를 할 때의 최고로 예쁜 모습을 보여주기 위해서 보련 씨랑 오드리 씨에게 도움받고.

1000660679.english: AC-6 Hussar, do you want to go on this date instead of me?
1000660679.korean: 후사르, 이번 데이트 나 대신 안 갈래?

1000660719.english: So you're doing it. CoCo & WhiteShell, hold her tight. I'm going to pretty this brat up.
1000660719.korean: 니 한다켔다. 코코, 단디 잡고 있어라. 내 이 가시나 꾸밀거리 가온다.

1000660729.english: - Held by the hands of CoCo & WhiteShell and AC-6 Hussar.

1000660732.english: - To be precise, CoCo & WhiteShell and AC-6 Hussar dragged her, and Spartoia was being dragged along.
1000660732.korean: - 정확하게 말하자면 코코와 후사르가 끌고 오고, 스파토이아가 끌려왔다.

1000660734.english: - AC-6 Hussar handed Spartoia's hand to me and said.
1000660734.korean: - 후사르는 나에게 스파토이아의 손을 쥐여주며 말했다.

1000660748.english: Coco and AC-6 Hussar forced me into this… Is it… weird? Can I go change?
1000660748.korean: 코코랑 후사르가 억지로 입혔는데... 이... 이상하지? 옷 갈아입고 와도 돼?

1000660965.english: AC-6 Hussar, can I borrow a pack too?
1000660965.korean: 후사르, 나도 팩 빌려줄 수 있어?

1000660995.english: - As soon as she woke up, C-79G Habetrot was apologizing.

1000661003.english: There's no problem with supplies, since Sergeant T-20S Gnome and Corporal T-50 PX Silky are helping me.
1000661003.korean: 물자 관련은 노움 병장님과 실키 상병님이 도와주고 계셔서 문제 없어요.

1000661006.english: Aaaaah! No, Private T-2 Brownie, you didn't do anything wrong either!
1000661006.korean: 아아아아! 아니에요, 브라우니 일병님도 아무 잘못 안 했어요!

1000661019.english: At that time, not only Captain Indomitable Marie but all the Steel Line members congratulated the Commander…
1000661019.korean: 그때 마리 대장님은 물론, 다른 스틸라인 분들도 모두 사령관님을 축하해드렸는데...

1000661030.english: Not only did you rescue Captain Indomitable Marie in danger, but you also devised the meticulous plan that allowed Steel Line to have its current strength!
1000661030.korean: 위기에 빠진 마리 대장님을 구출하신 데다, 스틸라인이 지금의 전력을 갖출 수 있게 치밀한 계획을 세우셨죠!

1000661065.english: ...What do you think, Sergeant T-20S Gnome?

1000661079.english: If it were Captain Indomitable Marie or Commander C-77 Red Hood… no, if it were the others, what gift would they prepare…?
1000661079.korean: 마리 대장님과 레드후드 연대장님이라면... 아니, 다른 분들이었다면 어떤 걸 선물해 드렸을까요...
